    .nav-link.active { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a55; }

    .header-right {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    }

    /* On laptop widths the 7-tab nav + heavy header-right won't fit one row, so give the
       nav its OWN full-width row (logo + controls on top, tabs below). Wide desktops
       (≥1700px) keep the single-row layout. Mobile (≤640px) uses the scrollable top tabs. */
    @media (min-width: 641px) and (max-width: 1699px) {
      header {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
        grid-template-rows: auto auto;
        height: auto; row-gap: 4px; padding-top: 7px; padding-bottom: 7px;
        column-gap: 16px;
      }
      .logo         { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1; }
      .header-right { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1; justify-self: end; }
      .header-nav   { grid-column: 1 / -1; grid-row: 2; }
    }

    #live-clock { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

    .market-status {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    }
    .market-status .dot-live {
      width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green);
      box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--green);
      animation: pulse 2s infinite;
    }
    .market-status.closed .dot-live { background: var(--text-dim); box-shadow: none; animation: none; }
    .market-status span { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .market-status.open span { color: var(--green); }

    @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} }

    .hdr-btn {
      background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 7px;
      padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }
    .hdr-btn:hover { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; }
      .header-nav { display: none; }
    }

    /* ── PAGE WRAPPER ── */
    .page { max-width: 1440px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 28px 24px 48px; }

    /* ── SECTION LABEL ── */
    .section-label {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .section-label .accent-bar {
      width: 3px; height: 18px; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .section-label h2 {
      font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    }
    .section-label .label-meta {
      font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-left: 4px;
    }
    .section-label .label-action {
      margin-left: auto; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    }
    .section-label .lbl-time { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

    .refresh-btn {
      background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 0.7rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .refresh-btn:hover { border-color: currentColor; }
    .refresh-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.35; cursor: default; }

    /* ── SECTOR HEATMAP ── */
    .sector-section { margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .sector-grid {
      display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
    }
    .sector-tile {
      border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid; padding: 10px 14px;
      min-width: 90px; text-align: center; transition: transform 0.15s;
      cursor: default;
    }
    .sector-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .sector-tile .st-sym  { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .sector-tile .st-name { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .sector-tile .st-pct  { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 800; }

    /* ── NEWS ── */
    .news-section { margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .news-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 20px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { .news-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }

    .news-col-head {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .col-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }

    .news-col-head h3 {
      font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    }
    .news-col-head .sub { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text-dim); }

    .news-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }

    .news-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 9px; padding: 14px 16px;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 28px 1fr;
      gap: 12px; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .news-card:hover { background: var(--card-hover); }
    .col-stocks .news-card:hover { border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .col-market  .news-card:hover { border-color: #4d91f544; }

    .n-rank {
      font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.1; padding-top: 1px;
    }
    .col-stocks .n-rank { color: #1a3c2a; }
    .col-market  .n-rank { color: #0e1f3a; }

    .n-meta { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 5px; flex-wrap: wrap; }

    .n-source {
      font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-dim);
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 6px;
    }
    .n-time { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

    .n-title { font-size: 0.87rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .n-title a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
    .col-stocks .n-title a:hover { color: var(--green); }
    .col-market  .n-title a:hover { color: var(--blue); }

    .n-desc {
      font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5;
      display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
    }

    .summarize-btn {
      margin-top: 8px; background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 0.68rem;
      color: var(--text-dim); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .col-stocks .summarize-btn:hover { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); }
    .col-market  .summarize-btn:hover { border-color: var(--blue);  color: var(--blue); }
    .summarize-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

    .ai-summary {
      display: none; margin-top: 8px; padding: 8px 10px;
      background: var(--bg); border-left: 2px solid var(--green);
      border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; font-size: 0.76rem; color: #7da89e; line-height: 1.55;
    }
    .col-market .ai-summary { border-left-color: var(--blue); }

    /* ── STATUS / SPINNER ── */
    .status { text-align: center; padding: 48px 0; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.88rem; }
    .status.error { color: var(--red); }
    .spinner {
      width: 26px; height: 26px; border: 2px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
      margin: 0 auto 12px;
    }
    .col-stocks .spinner { border-top-color: var(--green); }
    .col-market  .spinner { border-top-color: var(--blue); }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

    /* ── PICKS ── */
    .picks-section { margin-bottom: 32px; }

    /* Top pick hero */
    .top-pick-card {
      background: linear-gradient(140deg, var(--card) 0%, #0a1e12 100%);
      border: 1px solid #1a3d2a;
      border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px 28px; margin-bottom: 16px;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .top-pick-card::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--green), transparent);
    }

    .top-pick-badge {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      background: #f0a83218; border: 1px solid #f0a83240;
      color: var(--amber); border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 4px 14px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .top-pick-inner {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start;
    }
    @media (max-width: 640px) { .top-pick-inner { grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr; } .tp-sector-col { display: none; } }

    .tp-rating-col { text-align: center; }
    .tp-circle {
      width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid var(--green); background: var(--green-dim);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .tp-num  { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--green); line-height: 1; }
    .tp-den  { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .tp-label {
      margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--green);
    }

    .tp-body {}
    .tp-ticker { font-size: 1.7rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1; }
    .tp-company { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 3px 0 12px; }
    .tp-thesis  { font-size: 0.86rem; color: #8fa8c8; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 14px; }

    /* Factor bars */
    .factor-bars { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5px 20px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .fb-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr 20px; gap: 6px; align-items: center; }
    .fb-label { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-dim); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
    .fb-track { height: 3px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
    .fb-fill  { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; transition: width 0.5s ease; }
    .fb-fill.hi  { background: var(--green); }
    .fb-fill.mid { background: var(--amber); }
    .fb-fill.lo  { background: var(--red); }
    .fb-val { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; text-align: right; }
    .fb-val.hi  { color: var(--green); }
    .fb-val.mid { color: var(--amber); }
    .fb-val.lo  { color: var(--red); }

    .tp-risk {
      font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: flex-start;
    }
    .tp-risk span:first-child { color: var(--amber); flex-shrink: 0; }

    .tp-sector-col { padding-top: 2px; }
    .tp-sector-badge {
      font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a33;
      border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px 10px; white-space: nowrap; display: block;
    }

    /* Picks grid */
    .picks-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 12px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { .picks-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }

    /* ── Two-track picks (Short-Term / Long-Term) ── */
    .pick-track { margin-bottom: 26px; }
    .pick-track-head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .ptk-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .ptk-title.short { color: #ff9f1c; }
    .ptk-title.long  { color: var(--cyan); }
    .ptk-title.watch { color: var(--text-dim); }

    /* Every ticker is clickable → opens the search-bar lookup screen */
    .pc-ticker, .al-tk, .cx-ticker, .scr-ticker, .fade-tk, .opt-ticker, .alert-ticker, .pulse-tk { cursor: pointer; }
    .pc-ticker:hover, .al-tk:hover, .cx-ticker:hover, .scr-ticker:hover, .fade-tk:hover, .opt-ticker:hover, .alert-ticker:hover, .pulse-tk:hover { text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 2px; }

    /* Quality badges shown on every pick card */
    .pc-qbadges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; margin: 6px 0 2px; }
    .pc-qb { font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; }
    .pc-qb.tech { background: rgba(16,217,138,0.14); color: var(--green); }
    .pc-qb.fund { background: rgba(34,211,238,0.14); color: var(--cyan); }
    .pc-qb.meme { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.16); color: var(--amber); }
    .pc-qb.watch { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .ptk-sub { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .ptk-cnt { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1px 9px; }
    /* short-term technical badge */
    .pc-tech { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 4px 0 8px; }
    .pc-tech-badge { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 5px; }
    .pc-tech-badge.breakout { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a55; }
    .pc-tech-badge.setup    { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border: 1px solid #f0a83255; }
    .pc-tech-badge.early    { color: var(--cyan);  background: var(--cyan-dim);  border: 1px solid #06c4d455; }
    .pc-tech-bits { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    /* long-term fundamentals block */
    .pc-fund { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid #06c4d433; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 11px; margin: 4px 0 8px; }
    .pc-fund-h { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--cyan); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .fundrow { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); padding: 2px 0; }
    .fundrow b { color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .fundrow b.pos { color: var(--green); } .fundrow b.neg { color: var(--red); } .fundrow b.neu { color: var(--amber); }
    .fundrow b small { color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 600; }
    .fund-exp { color: var(--green); font-size: 0.92em; }

    .pick-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px 18px;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 44px 1fr; gap: 14px;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    }
    .pick-card:hover { background: var(--card-hover); border-color: var(--border-hi); }

    .pc-rank-col { text-align: center; }
    .pc-rank-num { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-bottom: 4px; }

    .pc-circle {
      width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; border: 2px solid; margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .pc-circle.strong-buy { color: var(--green); border-color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); }
    .pc-circle.buy        { color: #4dc88a;      border-color: #4dc88a88;   background: #031a0e; }
    .pc-circle.moderate   { color: var(--amber);  border-color: #f0a83288;   background: var(--amber-dim); }

    .pc-label { margin-top: 5px; font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .pc-label.strong-buy { color: var(--green); }
    .pc-label.buy        { color: #4dc88a; }
    .pc-label.moderate   { color: var(--amber); }

    .pc-body {}
    .pc-title-row { display: flex; gap: 7px; align-items: baseline; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .pc-ticker  { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
    .pc-company { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .pc-sector  {
      font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 5px;
    }
    .pc-src { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--amber); }

    .pc-thesis { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7a96b8; line-height: 1.5; margin: 6px 0 8px; }
    .pc-risk   { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); display: flex; gap: 5px; align-items: flex-start; }
    .pc-risk span:first-child { color: var(--amber); flex-shrink: 0; }

    /* Price row */
    .price-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .price-tag {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 5px; padding: 3px 9px; font-size: 0.74rem;
    }
    .p-label { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.64rem; }
    .p-val   { color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; }
    .p-chg   { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.68rem; }
    .p-chg.up   { color: var(--green); }
    .p-chg.down { color: var(--red); }

    .since-tag {
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid;
    }
    .since-tag.up   { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .since-tag.down { color: var(--red);   border-color: #ef505044; background: var(--red-dim); }

    /* Options signal */
    .options-signal {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: 6px; border: 1px solid;
    }
    .options-signal.bullish { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .options-signal.bearish { color: var(--red);   border-color: #ef505044; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .options-signal.neutral { color: var(--text-dim); border-color: var(--border); background: var(--bg); }

    /* Picks spinner */
    .picks-status { text-align: center; padding: 56px 0; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.88rem; }
    .picks-status.error { color: var(--red); }
    .picks-spinner {
      width: 26px; height: 26px; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-top-color: var(--amber);
      border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; margin: 0 auto 12px;
    }

    .chip {
      font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 6px;
      border: 1px solid; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    }
    .chip.purple { color: var(--purple); border-color: #8b6cf044; background: var(--purple-dim); }
    .chip.cyan   { color: var(--cyan);   border-color: #06c4d444;  background: var(--cyan-dim); }
    .chip.gray   { color: var(--text-dim); border-color: var(--border); background: var(--bg); }
    .chip.green  { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: rgba(16,217,138,0.10); }
    .chip.amber  { color: var(--amber); border-color: #f5a62344; background: rgba(245,166,35,0.10); }

    /* ── OPTIONS FLOW ── */
    .options-section { margin-bottom: 32px; }

    .opt-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 12px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { .opt-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }

    .opt-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px; padding: 18px 20px;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .opt-card::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;
      width: 3px; border-radius: 3px 0 0 3px;
    }
    .opt-card.bullish::before { background: var(--green); }
    .opt-card.bearish::before { background: var(--red); }
    .opt-card.neutral::before { background: var(--text-dim); }
    .opt-card:hover { background: var(--card-hover); }
    .opt-card.bullish:hover { border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .opt-card.bearish:hover { border-color: #ef505044; }

    .opt-header {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .opt-rank-badge {
      width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 900; border: 1px solid;
    }
    .opt-card.bullish .opt-rank-badge { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .opt-card.bearish .opt-rank-badge { color: var(--red);   border-color: #ef505044; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .opt-card.neutral .opt-rank-badge { color: var(--text-dim); border-color: var(--border); background: var(--bg); }

    .opt-title { flex: 1; }
    .opt-ticker  { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
    .opt-company { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 1px; }

    .opt-badges { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

    .opt-sentiment-badge {
      font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; border: 1px solid;
    }
    .opt-sentiment-badge.bullish { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .opt-sentiment-badge.bearish { color: var(--red);   border-color: #ef505044; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .opt-sentiment-badge.neutral { color: var(--text-dim); border-color: var(--border); background: var(--bg); }

    .opt-signal-badge {
      font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-dim);
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 7px;
    }

    .opt-confidence {
      margin-left: auto; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .opt-conf-num { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; }
    .opt-conf-label { font-size: 0.58rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .opt-card.bullish .opt-conf-num { color: var(--green); }
    .opt-card.bearish .opt-conf-num { color: var(--red); }

    .opt-activity {
      font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7a96b8; line-height: 1.5;
      margin-bottom: 12px; padding: 8px 10px;
      background: var(--bg); border-left: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0 5px 5px 0;
    }
    .opt-card.bullish .opt-activity { border-left-color: var(--green); }
    .opt-card.bearish .opt-activity { border-left-color: var(--red); }

    .opt-trade-box {
      background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .opt-trade-label { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .opt-trade-value { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }

    .opt-metrics {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .opt-metric {
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 7px; padding: 8px 10px; text-align: center;
    }
    .opt-metric .om-label { font-size: 0.58rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 3px; }
    .opt-metric .om-val   { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .opt-metric .om-val.target { color: var(--green); }
    .opt-metric .om-val.stop   { color: var(--red); }
    .opt-metric .om-val.rr     { color: var(--amber); }

    .opt-meta-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .opt-timeframe {
      font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--cyan);
      background: var(--cyan-dim); border: 1px solid #06c4d433;
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 8px; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    }

    .opt-basis { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .opt-risk  { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); display: flex; gap: 5px; }
    .opt-risk span:first-child { color: var(--amber); flex-shrink: 0; }

    .opt-status { text-align: center; padding: 56px 0; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.88rem; }
    .opt-status.error { color: var(--red); }
    .opt-spinner {
      width: 26px; height: 26px; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-top-color: #06c4d4;
      border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; margin: 0 auto 12px;
    }

    /* ── MOMENTUM ALERTS ── */
    .momentum-section { margin-bottom: 32px; }

    .alert-grid {
      /* minmax(0,1fr) (not 1fr=minmax(auto,1fr)) so a card with long unbreakable
         text can't blow its track wider than half the grid and shove the right
         column off-screen. */
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 14px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { .alert-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }

    .alert-card {
      background: var(--card);
      border: 1px solid #2a1a0a;
      border-radius: 12px; padding: 18px 20px;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      min-width: 0; overflow-wrap: break-word;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    }
    .alert-card::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b35, #ff9f1c, #ff6b35);
    }
    .alert-card:hover { background: var(--card-hover); border-color: #ff6b3544; }

    .alert-top {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .alert-rank {
      width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 900;
      background: #1a0c06; border: 1px solid #ff6b3544; color: #ff6b35;
    }
    .alert-title { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .alert-ticker  { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
    .alert-company { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 1px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

    .alert-price-col { text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .alert-price { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); }
    .alert-change {
      font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green);
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; justify-content: flex-end;
    }

    .alert-badges { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .alert-live-badge {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      background: #0d1e0d; border: 1px solid #10d98a44;
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px;
      font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green);
      text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }
    .alert-live-dot {
      width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green);
      animation: pulse 1.5s infinite;
    }
    .alert-signal-badge {
      background: #1a0c06; border: 1px solid #ff6b3533;
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px;
      font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ff9f1c;
    }
    .alert-social-badge {
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px;
      font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-dim);
    }

    .alert-volume-bar {
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    }
    .avb-label { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .avb-track { flex: 1; height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
    .avb-fill   { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b35, #ff9f1c); border-radius: 2px; }
    .avb-val    { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ff9f1c; flex-shrink: 0; }

    .alert-targets {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .at-box {
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 7px; padding: 7px 9px; text-align: center;
    }
    .at-label { font-size: 0.55rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 3px; }
    .at-val   { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .at-val.entry  { color: #ff9f1c; }
    .at-val.target { color: var(--green); }
    .at-val.stop   { color: var(--red); }
    .rr-line { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 6px 10px; margin: 8px 0 2px; font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .rr-line .rr-risk b { color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .rr-badge { font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .rr-badge.ok  { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a44; }
    .rr-badge.bad { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border: 1px solid #ef505044; }
    .rr-basis { color: var(--text-muted); }
    .rr-why { color: var(--red); font-weight: 600; }
    .rr-fallback { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border: 1px solid #f0a83244; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1.45; }

    .alert-meta { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .alert-tf {
      font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--cyan);
      background: var(--cyan-dim); border: 1px solid #06c4d433;
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 7px;
    }
    .alert-rr { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--amber); }
    .alert-conf { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-dim); }

    /* ── Distance-from-breakout-point chip ── */
    .mom-breakout {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
      font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700;
      border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 9px; margin-bottom: 10px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .mom-breakout .mb-ic  { font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1; }
    .mom-breakout .mb-txt { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .mom-breakout .mb-lvl { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .mom-breakout.past.buy     { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .mom-breakout.past.sell    { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border-color: #ef505044; }
    .mom-breakout.approaching  { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border-color: #f0a83244; }

    .alert-thesis { font-size: 0.76rem; color: #7a96b8; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 7px; }
    .alert-risk   { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); display: flex; gap: 5px; }
    .alert-risk span:first-child { color: var(--amber); flex-shrink: 0; }

    /* ── After-hours price line ── */
    .alert-ah {
      font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 2px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .alert-ah .ah-tag {
      font-size: 0.52rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--bg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 4px;
    }
    .alert-change.up   { color: var(--green); }
    .alert-change.down { color: var(--red); }
    .price-flash { animation: priceFlash 0.6s ease; }
    @keyframes priceFlash { 0% { color: var(--cyan); } 100% {} }

    /* ── Live chart toggle + panel ── */
    .chart-toggle {
      width: 100%; margin-top: 10px;
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 7px; padding: 8px;
      font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s;
    }
    .chart-toggle:hover { border-color: #ff6b3566; color: #ff9f1c; }
    .chart-toggle .ct-arrow { transition: transform 0.2s; }
    .chart-toggle.open .ct-arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); }

    .chart-panel {
      margin-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 12px;
      animation: fadeUp 0.25s ease;
    }
    .chart-loading { text-align: center; padding: 28px 0; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.78rem; }
    .chart-loading .mom-spinner { width: 20px; height: 20px; margin-bottom: 8px; }

    /* Signal verdict banner */
    .sig-banner {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg);
    }
    .sig-banner.buy        { border-color: #10d98a55; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .sig-banner.strong_buy { border-color: #10d98a99; background: #062416; }
    .sig-banner.sell       { border-color: #ef505055; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .sig-banner.strong_sell{ border-color: #ef505099; background: #2a0808; }
    .sig-banner.hold       { border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .sig-verdict { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; min-width: 86px; }
    .sig-action { font-size: 1.02rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1; }
    .sig-banner.buy .sig-action, .sig-banner.strong_buy .sig-action { color: var(--green); }
    .sig-banner.sell .sig-action, .sig-banner.strong_sell .sig-action { color: var(--red); }
    .sig-banner.hold .sig-action { color: var(--amber); }
    .sig-conf { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .sig-reasons { flex: 1; min-width: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }
    .sig-reason { font-size: 0.68rem; color: #8aa6c8; display: flex; gap: 5px; line-height: 1.3; }
    .sig-reason .sr-dot { flex-shrink: 0; }
    .sig-reason.bull .sr-dot { color: var(--green); }
    .sig-reason.bear .sr-dot { color: var(--red); }

    /* Dual-horizon read (short-term × long-term) */
    .dual-read { border: 1px solid var(--border-hi); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; background: var(--bg); }
    .dual-horizons { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6px; }
    .dh-cell { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-hi, rgba(255,255,255,0.02)); }
    .dh-top { font-size: 0.56rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 700; }
    .dh-val { font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
    .dh-sub { font-size: 0.6rem; color: #8aa6c8; line-height: 1.25; }
    .dh-val.bullish { color: var(--green); } .dh-val.bearish { color: var(--red); } .dh-val.neutral { color: var(--amber); }
    .dh-cell.bullish { border-color: #10d98a55; } .dh-cell.bearish { border-color: #ef505055; }
    .dual-verdict { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .dv-setup { font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; }
    .dv-setup.pos { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); }
    .dv-setup.neg { background: var(--red-dim); color: var(--red); }
    .dv-setup.mix { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.14); color: var(--amber); }
    .dv-text { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .dv-ai { font-size: 0.56rem; color: var(--cyan); font-weight: 700; opacity: 0.85; }
    .dual-note { font-size: 0.68rem; color: #8aa6c8; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.35; display: flex; gap: 6px; }
    .dual-note .dn-stance { font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .dual-track { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 6px; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); padding-top: 6px; }
    .dual-track b { color: var(--text); }

    /* 🎯 Dual Confirmed cards */
    .al-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .al-card { padding: 12px 14px; }
    .al-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
    .al-tk { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.02rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
    .al-co { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
    .al-conv { font-weight: 900; font-size: 0.82rem; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; cursor: help; }
    .al-conv.hi { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); }
    .al-conv.mid { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.16); color: var(--amber); }
    .al-conv.lo { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .dt-chart-btn { background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border-hi); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem; padding: 2px 6px; }
    .dt-chart-btn.open { border-color: var(--cyan); }
    .al-price { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 7px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .al-px { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.95rem; }
    .al-chg { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; }
    .al-chg.up, .al-ah.up { color: var(--green); }
    .al-chg.down, .al-ah.down { color: var(--red); }
    .al-ah { font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 600; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 5px; padding: 1px 6px; }
    .al-horizons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; margin-top: 9px; }
    .al-h { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--green-dim); border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 8px; }
    .al-h b { color: var(--green); }
    .al-reasons { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4; }
    .al-levels { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 9px; font-size: 0.72rem; }
    .al-levels span { color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .al-levels i { font-style: normal; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 400; margin-right: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .dt-chart-panel { margin-top: 10px; }

    /* 💰 Options Moves — put-selling setups */
    .ps-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .ps-card { padding: 12px 14px; }
    .ps-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
    .ps-rank { font-family: var(--font-mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-muted); min-width: 22px; }
    .ps-tk { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.02rem; cursor: pointer; }
    .ps-tk:hover { text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 2px; }
    .ps-now { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .ps-co { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
    .ps-grade { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 900; padding: 1px 8px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: help; }
    .ps-grade.g-a { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); }
    .ps-grade.g-b { background: rgba(34,211,238,0.16); color: var(--cyan); }
    .ps-grade.g-c { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.16); color: var(--amber); }
    .ps-grade.g-d { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .ps-tier { font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; }
    .ps-tier.hi { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); }
    .ps-tier.mid { background: rgba(34,211,238,0.14); color: var(--cyan); }
    .ps-tier.lo { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .ps-trade { margin-top: 10px; background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #16a34a44; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 11px; }
    .ps-trade-main { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 700; }
    .ps-trade-main b { color: var(--green); }
    .ps-trade-sub { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 2px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .ps-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 9px; }
    .ps-iv, .ps-earn, .ps-meta { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; }
    .ps-iv.iv-hi { background: rgba(16,217,138,0.16); color: var(--green); }
    .ps-iv.iv-mid { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.16); color: var(--amber); }
    .ps-iv.iv-lo { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .ps-earn { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.16); color: var(--amber); }
    .ps-meta { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .ps-reasons { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 9px; line-height: 1.4; }
    .ps-caution { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--amber); margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4; }

    /* Long-term second opinions panel */
    .dual-recs { margin-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
    .lr-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 3px; }
    .lr-title { font-size: 0.58rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 700; }
    .lr-consensus { font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .lr-consensus.pos { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); }
    .lr-consensus.neg { background: var(--red-dim); color: var(--red); }
    .lr-consensus.mix { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.14); color: var(--amber); }
    .lr-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 96px 46px 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.68rem; }
    .lr-name { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; }
    .lr-chip { font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 800; text-align: center; padding: 2px 0; border-radius: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
    .lr-chip.pos { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); }
    .lr-chip.neg { background: var(--red-dim); color: var(--red); }
    .lr-chip.mix { background: rgba(240,168,50,0.14); color: var(--amber); }
    .lr-chip.na { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .lr-detail { color: var(--text-muted); overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
    .lr-mom { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 900; margin-right: 4px; cursor: help; }
    .lr-mom.up { color: var(--green); }
    .lr-mom.down { color: var(--red); }
    .lr-mom.flat { color: var(--text-muted); }

    .chart-levels {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .cl-box { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 7px; text-align: center; }
    .cl-label { font-size: 0.52rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .cl-val { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .cl-val.entry { color: #ff9f1c; } .cl-val.target { color: var(--green); }
    .cl-val.stop { color: var(--red); } .cl-val.rr { color: var(--cyan); }

    .chart-canvas-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; }
    .chart-canvas-wrap canvas { width: 100%; display: block; border-radius: 6px; }
    .chart-legend { display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 7px; font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .chart-legend span { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }
    .cleg-swatch { width: 12px; height: 2px; border-radius: 1px; display: inline-block; }
    .chart-stats { display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .chart-stats b { color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; }
    .chart-err { color: var(--red); font-size: 0.74rem; text-align: center; padding: 18px 0; }
    .chart-disclaimer {
      margin-top: 9px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.6rem; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--text-dim);
    }

    /* Ticker-lookup modal (search-any-stock) */
    .tkl-head { margin: 0 34px 4px 0; }
    .tkl-tk { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--text); }
    .tkl-price { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px; margin: 2px 0 2px; }
    .tkl-px { font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--text); }
    .tkl-chg { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; }
    .tkl-ah-row { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .tkl-ah-row b { font-weight: 800; }
    .tkl-verdict { align-items: flex-start; margin: 10px 0 12px; }
    .tkl-vic { font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 1; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .tkl-vtext { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .tkl-vhead { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .tkl-vhead b { font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--text); }
    .tkl-verdict.buy .tkl-vhead b, .tkl-verdict.strong_buy .tkl-vhead b { color: var(--green); }
    .tkl-verdict.sell .tkl-vhead b, .tkl-verdict.strong_sell .tkl-vhead b { color: var(--red); }
    .tkl-verdict.hold .tkl-vhead b { color: var(--amber); }
    .tkl-vsub { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.4; margin-top: 3px; }
    .tkl-vconf { color: var(--text-muted); }
    .tkl-mentions { margin-top: 14px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .tkl-mtitle { font-size: 0.6rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .tkl-mnone { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.4; }
    .tkl-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
    .tkl-chip {
      background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text);
      border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 12px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
    }
    .tkl-chip:hover { border-color: var(--cyan); color: var(--cyan); }
    .tkl-sec { margin-top: 14px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .tkl-lean { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .tkl-pill { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 800; border-radius: 999px; padding: 3px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .tkl-pill.bull { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a55; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .tkl-pill.bear { color: var(--red); border-color: #ef505055; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .tkl-pill.neutral { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .tkl-pill.warn { color: var(--amber); border-color: #f0a83244; background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .tkl-stars { color: #8a6dff; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 1px; }
    .tkl-flow-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text); padding: 3px 0; }
    .tkl-dir { font-weight: 800; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .tkl-dir.bull { color: var(--green); } .tkl-dir.bear { color: var(--red); }
    .tkl-quote { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.45; margin-top: 6px; font-style: italic; }
    .tkl-fine { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.4; margin-top: 6px; }

    /* ── WHY NOW — the composed FOR/AGAINST case + honest track record ── */
    .wn-card {
      border: 1px solid var(--border-hi); border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 12px 13px; margin: 10px 0 12px;
      background: var(--card); border-left-width: 3px;
    }
    .wn-card.wn-constructive { border-left-color: var(--green); background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--green-dim), var(--card) 60%); }
    .wn-card.wn-watch        { border-left-color: var(--amber); background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--amber-dim), var(--card) 60%); }
    .wn-card.wn-caution      { border-left-color: var(--red);   background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--red-dim), var(--card) 60%); }
    .wn-card.wn-quiet        { border-left-color: var(--text-dim); }
    .wn-card.wn-loading      { border-left-color: var(--border-hi); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
    .wn-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .wn-badge { font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .wn-regime { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .wn-loadtxt { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .wn-verdict { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 9px; }
    .wn-vic { font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.1; }
    .wn-vhead { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .wn-vsum { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.45; }
    .wn-cases { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; margin-top: 11px; }
    .wn-sig { border-radius: 7px; padding: 7px 9px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .wn-sig.wn-for     { border-left: 2px solid var(--green); }
    .wn-sig.wn-against { border-left: 2px solid var(--red); }
    .wn-sig.wn-context { border-left: 2px solid var(--text-dim); }
    .wn-sig-h { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
    .wn-sig-mark { font-size: 0.7rem; }
    .wn-for .wn-sig-mark { color: var(--green); }
    .wn-against .wn-sig-mark { color: var(--red); }
    .wn-context .wn-sig-mark { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .wn-sig-label { font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
    .wn-sig-detail { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.4; margin-top: 3px; }
    .wn-track {
      font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green);
      background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a33;
      padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 4px; white-space: nowrap; margin-left: auto;
    }
    .wn-track-pending { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border-color: #f0a83233; }
    .wn-track-neg { color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); border-color: #ef505033; }
    .wn-track-note { color: var(--text-dim); background: transparent; border-color: var(--border); font-weight: 500; white-space: normal; }
    /* Per-section model-quality (score-decile) chip — does this class's score rank winners? */
    .wn-rq { font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 4px; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: help; }
    .wn-rq-good { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a33; }
    .wn-rq-ok { color: var(--cyan, #22d3ee); background: rgba(34,211,238,.12); border-color: rgba(34,211,238,.2); }
    .wn-rq-noise { color: var(--text-dim); background: rgba(148,163,184,.12); border-color: var(--border); }
    .wn-rq-neg { color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); border-color: #ef505033; }
    .wn-asof { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; }
    .wn-fine { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.4; margin-top: 9px; }
    /* Full model coverage — every lens, incl. quiet + no-data */
    .wn-coverage { margin: 9px 0 2px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--card); }
    .wn-coverage > summary { cursor: pointer; padding: 7px 11px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); list-style: none; display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; }
    .wn-coverage > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .wn-coverage > summary::before { content: '▸ '; }
    .wn-coverage[open] > summary::before { content: '▾ '; }
    .wn-cov-count { margin-left: auto; font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 600; }
    .wn-cov-body { padding: 2px 11px 9px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
    .wn-cov-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 16px minmax(120px, auto) 1fr; gap: 7px; align-items: baseline; font-size: 0.68rem; }
    .wn-cov-mark { text-align: center; }
    .wn-cov-label { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
    .wn-cov-detail { color: var(--text-muted); }
    .wn-cov-clear .wn-cov-label, .wn-cov-clear .wn-cov-mark { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .wn-cov-na { opacity: 0.55; }
    /* Collapsible pillar-level breakdown */
    .wn-breakdown { margin: 2px 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--card); }
    .wn-breakdown > summary { cursor: pointer; padding: 8px 11px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); list-style: none; }
    .wn-breakdown > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .wn-breakdown > summary::before { content: '▸ '; }
    .wn-breakdown[open] > summary::before { content: '▾ '; }
    .wn-bd-body { padding: 4px 11px 11px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
    .wn-bd-grp { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
    .wn-bd-h { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .wn-pillar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.66rem; }
    .wn-plabel { color: var(--text-dim); flex: 0 0 42%; }
    .wn-pbar { flex: 1; height: 6px; background: var(--surface); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; }
    .wn-pfill { display: block; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a6df0, var(--green)); }
    .wn-pval { color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; flex: 0 0 auto; min-width: 20px; text-align: right; }

    /* WHY NOW verdict badge on screener/ghost/opportunity cards */
    .wn-badge {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px;
      font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 4px; white-space: nowrap;
      border: 1px solid transparent; vertical-align: middle;
    }
    .wn-badge.wn-b-constructive { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .wn-badge.wn-b-watch        { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border-color: #f0a83244; }
    .wn-badge.wn-b-caution      { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border-color: #ef505044; }

    /* ── Strong Buy/Sell live verdict badge (shown on the toggle button) ── */
    .sig-badge {
      font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px;
    }
    .sig-badge:empty { display: none; }
    .sig-badge.buy  { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a66; animation: sigPulse 1.2s infinite; }
    .sig-badge.sell { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border: 1px solid #ef505066; animation: sigPulse 1.2s infinite; }
    @keyframes sigPulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } }

    /* Flash the whole card when its signal flips into Strong territory */
    @keyframes cardFlashBuy  { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } 18% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #10d98a, 0 0 24px #10d98a88; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } }
    @keyframes cardFlashSell { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } 18% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #ef5050, 0 0 24px #ef505088; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } }
    .card-flash-buy  { animation: cardFlashBuy  1.4s ease 3; }
    .card-flash-sell { animation: cardFlashSell 1.4s ease 3; }

    /* ── Momentum two-column layout (Strong Buy / Strong Sell) ── */
    .mom-columns { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 16px; align-items: start; }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { .mom-columns { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }
    .mom-col { min-width: 0; }
    .mom-col-head {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
      padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 9px; margin-bottom: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .mom-col-head.buy  { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .mom-col-head.sell { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border-color: #ef505044; }
    .mom-col-head .cnt {
      margin-left: auto; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-dim);
      background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 20px; padding: 1px 9px;
    }
    .mom-col-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
    .mom-col-empty {
      text-align: center; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.78rem;
      padding: 34px 14px; border: 1px dashed var(--border); border-radius: 10px;
    }
    .alert-card.buy::before  { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10d98a, #06c4d4, #10d98a); }
    .alert-card.sell::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ef5050, #ff6b35, #ef5050); }
    .alert-card.buy:hover  { border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .alert-card.sell:hover { border-color: #ef505044; }
    .alert-rank.buy  { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .alert-rank.sell { color: var(--red);   border-color: #ef505044; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .mom-action-badge { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 800; border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }
    .mom-action-badge.buy  { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a55; }
    .mom-action-badge.sell { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border: 1px solid #ef505055; }
    .sig-reasons-static { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; margin: 10px 0; }

    /* ── BREAKOUT SCREENER ── */
    /* minmax(0,1fr) (not 1fr=minmax(auto,1fr)) so a card with a long account list or
       post text can't blow its column past half the grid and push the right column
       off-screen (this grid backs the Trade Alerts .cx-card view). */
    .scr-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 14px; }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { .scr-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }
    .scr-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 16px 18px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    }
    .scr-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0; height: 2px; }
    .scr-card.breakout::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10d98a, #06c4d4, #10d98a); }
    .scr-card.setup::before    { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0a832, #ff9f1c, #f0a832); }
    .scr-card.early::before    { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8a6dff, #06c4d4, #8a6dff); }
    .scr-card:hover { background: var(--card-hover); border-color: var(--border-hi); }

    .scr-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; margin: 2px 0 11px; }
    .scr-tag { font-size: 0.55rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-dim); }
    .scr-tag.vcp { color: #8a6dff; border-color: #8a6dff44; background: #120c24; }
    .scr-tag.pp  { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .scr-tag.vdu { color: var(--cyan); border-color: #06c4d444; background: var(--cyan-dim); }
    .scr-tag.obv { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .scr-tag.ud  { color: var(--amber); border-color: #f0a83244; background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .scr-tag.earn { color: var(--red); border-color: #ef505055; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .scr-tag.si { color: var(--amber); border-color: #f0a83244; background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .scr-tag.si.hi { color: var(--red); border-color: #ef505055; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .scr-tag.rsnh { color: #06c4d4; border-color: #06c4d455; background: var(--cyan-dim); }
    .scr-tag.lbase { color: var(--text-dim); border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .scr-tag.model { color: #8a6dff; border-color: #8a6dff55; background: #120c24; }
    .scr-tag.emerg { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a; background: var(--green-dim); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #10d98a33; }
    .scr-liq { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 800;
      padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 5px; margin: 0 0 10px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: help; }
    .scr-liq-ic { font-size: 0.6rem; }
    .scr-liq.high { color: var(--red); border: 1px solid #ef505055; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .scr-liq.caution { color: var(--amber); border: 1px solid #f0a83244; background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .scr-funda { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 2px 0 10px; }
    .scr-funda b { font-weight: 800; } .scr-funda b.pos { color: var(--green); } .scr-funda b.neg { color: var(--red); }
    .scr-funda-yoy { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.56rem; }

    .scr-top { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .scr-rank {
      width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 900; background: var(--bg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim);
    }
    .scr-title { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .scr-tk-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .scr-ticker { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
    .scr-status { font-size: 0.55rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .scr-status.breakout { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a55; }
    .scr-status.setup    { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border: 1px solid #f0a83255; }
    .scr-status.early    { color: #8a6dff; background: #120c24; border: 1px solid #8a6dff55; }
    .scr-company { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 2px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
    .scr-company .scr-theme { color: var(--cyan); font-weight: 600; }
    /* 🎙 earnings-call tone chip (roadmap Step 3). */
    .scr-tone { font-size: 0.55rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: help; white-space: nowrap; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .scr-tone.bull { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a55; }
    .scr-tone.bear { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border: 1px solid #ef505055; }
    .scr-tone.neu  { color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    /* 📈/⚡ fast-vs-sticky attention chip (roadmap Step 4). */
    .scr-attn { font-size: 0.55rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: help; white-space: nowrap; }
    .scr-attn.sticky { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a55; }
    .scr-attn.fast   { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border: 1px solid #f0a83255; }
    .scr-score-col { text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .scr-score { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--green); line-height: 1; }
    .scr-score small { font-size: 0.58rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
    .scr-price { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); margin-top: 5px; }
    .scr-chg { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; }
    .scr-chg.up { color: var(--green); } .scr-chg.down { color: var(--red); }

    .scr-criteria { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr); gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 11px; }
    .scr-chip {
      text-align: center; border-radius: 7px; padding: 6px 2px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg);
    }
    .scr-chip .scc-ic { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .scr-chip .scc-lb { font-size: 0.5rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 3px; display: block; }
    .scr-chip.met { border-color: #10d98a55; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .scr-chip.met .scc-ic { color: var(--green); }
    .scr-chip.met .scc-lb { color: var(--green); }

    /* ── Required hard-gate filters (the 4 every candidate must pass) ── */
    .scr-filters-row { margin-bottom: 11px; }
    .scr-filters-label { font-size: 0.5rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .scr-filters { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 4px; }
    .scr-fchip {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      padding: 4px 7px; border-radius: 5px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 0.6rem;
    }
    .scr-fchip .sf-ic { font-weight: 800; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .scr-fchip .sf-lb { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .scr-fchip .sf-lb b { color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .scr-fchip.pass { border-color: #10d98a55; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .scr-fchip.pass .sf-ic { color: var(--green); }
    .scr-fchip.fail { border-color: #ef505044; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .scr-fchip.fail .sf-ic { color: var(--red); }

    /* ── SIGNAL SCOREBOARD ── */
    .sb-intro { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .sb-alloc { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin: 4px 0 10px; }
    .sb-alloc-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.72rem; }
    .sb-alloc-nm { width: 84px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .sb-alloc-track { flex: 1; height: 8px; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 5px; overflow: hidden; min-width: 60px; }
    .sb-alloc-fill { display: block; height: 100%; background: #8a6dff; }
    .sb-alloc-w { width: 40px; text-align: right; color: var(--text); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .sb-alloc-meta { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.66rem; }
    .sb-alloc-blend { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text); margin-top: 4px; }
    .sb-alloc-cash { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text); margin-top: 5px; padding-top: 5px; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); }
    .sb-alloc-gov { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text); margin-top: 5px; padding-top: 5px; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); }
    .sb-alloc-corr { font-size: 0.66rem; margin-top: 5px; }
    .sb-regime-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--bg); }
    .sb-regime-lb { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); }
    .sb-regime-sel { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); background: var(--bg-hi);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-hi); border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; }
    .sb-regime-note { flex: 1 1 240px; font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.45; }
    .sb-thin { font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--amber); border: 1px solid #f0a83244;
      background: var(--amber-dim); border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 5px; margin-left: 4px; cursor: help; }
    .sb-empty { padding: 28px 20px; text-align: center; color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px dashed var(--border); border-radius: 12px; line-height: 1.6; }
    .sb-empty code { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px; }
    .sb-secgroup { margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .sb-secgroup-h { font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--text-muted); margin: 0 0 8px 2px; font-weight: 700; }
    .sb-secgroup-h[title] { cursor: help; }
    .sb-help-i { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--cyan); border: 1px solid #06c4d455; border-radius: 999px; width: 13px; height: 13px; line-height: 12px; text-align: center; cursor: help; vertical-align: middle; opacity: 0.85; }
    .sb-h-lb[title] { cursor: help; }
    /* Novice hover affordance on annotated chips / pillars across the older tabs. */
    .scr-chip[title], .cx-pill[title], .scr-criteria .scr-chip[title] { cursor: help; }
    .sb-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .sb-card { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px; background: var(--bg); position: relative; }
    .sb-card.pos { border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .sb-card.neg { border-color: #ef505044; }
    .sb-card.disabled { opacity: 0.5; }
    .sb-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .sb-exp { font-size: 0.56rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .sb-exp.pos { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); }
    .sb-exp.neg { color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); }
    .sb-exp.pending { color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .sb-title { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .sb-sig { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); }
    .sb-toggle { font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 5px 9px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-dim); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .sb-toggle.on  { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a55; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .sb-toggle.off { color: var(--red);   border-color: #ef505055; background: var(--red-dim); }
    .sb-count { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 11px; }
    .sb-model { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.56rem; font-weight: 800; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; padding: 1px 7px; margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: middle; cursor: help; }
    .sb-horizons { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(74px, 1fr)); gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .sb-h { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 4px; text-align: center; }
    .sb-h-lb { font-size: 0.54rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .sb-h-ret { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; margin: 3px 0; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .sb-h-ret.up { color: var(--green); }
    .sb-h-ret.down { color: var(--red); }
    .sb-h-ret.na { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.7rem; }
    .sb-h-sub { font-size: 0.54rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .sb-h-exc { font-size: 0.54rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 4px; padding-top: 4px; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .sb-h-exc.up { color: var(--green); }
    .sb-h-exc.down { color: var(--red); }
    .sb-h-exc.na { color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 400; }
    .sb-h-net { font-size: 0.54rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 3px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; opacity: 0.92; }
    .sb-h-net.up { color: var(--green); }
    .sb-h-net.down { color: var(--red); }
    .sb-h-sec { font-size: 0.54rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 3px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; opacity: 0.82; font-style: italic; }
    .sb-h-sec.up { color: var(--green); }
    .sb-h-sec.down { color: var(--red); }
    .sb-h-real { font-size: 0.54rem; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 3px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .sb-h-real.up { color: var(--green); opacity: 0.85; }
    .sb-h-real.down { color: var(--red); opacity: 0.85; }
    .sb-wl { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 8px; }
    .sb-wl b.win  { color: var(--green); }
    .sb-wl b.loss { color: var(--red); }
    .sb-bw { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px 12px; font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 7px; }
    .sb-bw b { color: var(--accent, #06c4d4); }
    .sb-strat { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 7px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 8px; }
    .sb-strat b.win { color: var(--green); }
    .sb-strat b.loss { color: var(--red); }
    .sb-strat-n { color: var(--text-dim); opacity: 0.7; }
    .sb-liq { margin-top: 7px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 7px; font-size: 0.62rem; }
    .sb-liq > summary { cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-dim); list-style: none; font-weight: 700; }
    .sb-liq > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .sb-liq > summary::before { content: '▸ '; }
    .sb-liq[open] > summary::before { content: '▾ '; }
    .sb-liq-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; margin-top: 5px; }
    .sb-liq-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto auto 1fr; gap: 8px; align-items: baseline; }
    .sb-liq-nm { color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; }
    .sb-liq-v.up { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .sb-liq-v.down { color: var(--red); font-weight: 700; }
    .sb-liq-sub { text-align: right; }
    .sb-bwbadge { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.56rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #0b0e14; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#f0a832,#06c4d4); border-radius: 999px; padding: 1px 7px; margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: middle; }
    .sb-help { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 14px; background: var(--bg); }
    .sb-help > summary { cursor: pointer; padding: 11px 14px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--amber); list-style: none; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
    .sb-help > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .sb-help > summary::after { content: "▾"; margin-left: auto; transition: transform 0.2s; font-size: 0.7rem; }
    .sb-help[open] > summary::after { transform: rotate(180deg); }
    .sb-help-body { padding: 0 14px 12px; font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.6; }
    .sb-help-body p { margin: 0 0 4px; }
    .sb-help-body h4 { color: var(--text); font-size: 0.66rem; margin: 12px 0 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .sb-help-body ul { margin: 4px 0; padding-left: 18px; }
    .sb-help-body li { margin: 3px 0; }
    .sb-help-body code { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9em; }
    .sb-help-body b { color: var(--text); }

    .scr-metrics { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px 12px; font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .scr-metrics b { color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; }
    .scr-narrative { font-size: 0.76rem; color: #8aa6c8; line-height: 1.5; margin: 2px 0 8px; }
    .scr-narr-str { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--amber); font-weight: 700; }

    /* Quant factor mini-bars */
    .scr-quant { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin: 2px 0 11px; }
    .scr-qf { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .scr-qf .qf-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.52rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
    .scr-qf .qf-top b { color: var(--text); font-weight: 800; }
    .scr-qf .qf-track { height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
    .scr-qf .qf-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #06c4d4, #10d98a); }

    .scr-tier { font-size: 0.55rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .scr-tier.small { color: var(--cyan); border-color: #06c4d444; background: var(--cyan-dim); }
    .scr-tier.micro { color: var(--amber); border-color: #f0a83244; background: var(--amber-dim); }

    .scr-subhead { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 28px 0 14px; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); }
    .scr-subhead .sub-meta { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; }

    /* Tune Quant Weights panel */
    .scr-help { margin: 4px 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 9px; background: var(--bg); overflow: hidden; }
    .scr-help > summary { cursor: pointer; padding: 10px 13px; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 700; color: #10d98a; list-style: none; user-select: none; }
    .scr-help > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .scr-help > summary::before { content: '▸ '; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .scr-help[open] > summary::before { content: '▾ '; }
    .scr-help > summary:hover { background: var(--bg-hi); }
    .scr-help-body { padding: 4px 15px 14px; font-size: 0.74rem; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text-dim); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .scr-help-body p { margin: 9px 0; }
    .scr-help-body b { color: var(--text); }
    .scr-help-h { font-weight: 700; color: var(--text) !important; margin-top: 13px !important; }
    .scr-help-body ul, .scr-help-body ol { margin: 6px 0 6px 4px; padding-left: 18px; }
    .scr-help-body li { margin: 5px 0; }
    .scr-help-note { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-style: italic; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); padding-top: 9px; }
    .scr-tune { margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .scr-tune-toggle {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; width: 100%;
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim);
      border-radius: 9px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
    }
    .scr-tune-toggle:hover { border-color: #10d98a55; color: #10d98a; }
    .scr-tune-toggle.open .ct-arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); }
    .scr-tune-body { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-top: none; border-radius: 0 0 9px 9px; padding: 14px; background: var(--bg); animation: fadeUp 0.2s ease; }
    .scr-w-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 130px 1fr 34px; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 9px; }
    @media (max-width: 520px) { .scr-w-row { grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr 30px; gap: 7px; } }
    .scr-w-row label { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
    .scr-w-row input[type=range] {
      -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; height: 4px; border-radius: 2px;
      background: var(--border); outline: none; width: 100%;
    }
    .scr-w-row input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: #10d98a; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid #06121f;
    }
    .scr-w-row input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb { width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: #10d98a; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid #06121f; }
    .scr-w-val { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green); text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .scr-tune-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .scr-tune-note { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .scr-tune-seg { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .scr-seg { flex: 1; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 7px; padding: 6px; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
    .scr-seg.active { background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a66; color: var(--green); }
    .scr-tune-presets { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .scr-preset { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
    .scr-preset:hover { border-color: #10d98a55; color: var(--text); }
