    .scr-preset.save { color: #10d98a; border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .scr-preset .pdel { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.62rem; }
    .scr-preset .pdel:hover { color: var(--red); }
    .scr-rankby { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 0 0 10px; }
    .scr-rankby b { color: #10d98a; font-weight: 700; }
    .scr-filters { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .scr-filter {
      flex: 1; min-width: 130px; max-width: 220px;
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text);
      border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer; -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none;
      background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 50%, var(--text-dim) 50%), linear-gradient(135deg, var(--text-dim) 50%, transparent 50%);
      background-position: calc(100% - 16px) center, calc(100% - 11px) center;
      background-size: 5px 5px, 5px 5px; background-repeat: no-repeat;
    }
    .scr-filter:focus { outline: none; border-color: #10d98a66; }
    .scr-hc {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim);
      border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
      white-space: nowrap; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .scr-hc:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: #10d98a55; }
    .scr-hc.active { background: var(--green); color: #06121f; border-color: #10d98a; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px -2px #10d98a66; }
    .scr-tag.hc { color: #06121f; background: var(--green); border-color: var(--green); }
    .scr-hc-def { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: -4px 0 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .scr-hc-def b { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .scr-hc-winlabel { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .scr-hc-win { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
    .sec-bar { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .sec-chip { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
    .sec-chip b { color: var(--text); }
    .sec-chip:hover { border-color: #10d98a55; color: var(--text); }
    .sec-chip.active { background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a66; color: var(--green); }
    .sec-chip.clear { color: var(--red); border-color: #ef505044; }

    /* Sector rotation panel */
    .rot-panel { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .rot-dw-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 14px; }
    .rot-dw-grid .rot-panel { margin-bottom: 0; }
    @media (max-width: 760px) { .rot-dw-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }
    .rot-head { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .rot-sub { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .rot-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr 70px; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 4px 0; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px; }
    @media (max-width: 520px) { .rot-row { grid-template-columns: 88px 1fr 60px; gap: 7px; } }
    .rot-row:hover { background: var(--surface); }
    .rot-name { font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
    .rot-row:hover .rot-name { color: var(--text); }
    .rot-dtrack { position: relative; height: 10px; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px; }
    .rot-mid { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; background: var(--border-hi); }
    .rot-pos { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 1px; bottom: 1px; border-radius: 0 3px 3px 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10d98a, #06c4d4); }
    .rot-neg { position: absolute; right: 50%; top: 1px; bottom: 1px; border-radius: 3px 0 0 3px; background: linear-gradient(270deg, #ef5050, #ff6b35); }
    .rot-val { font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 800; text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .rot-val.ow { color: var(--green); } .rot-val.uw { color: var(--red); }
    .rt-spark { height: 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; }
    .rt-spark svg { width: 100%; height: 24px; display: block; }
    .rt-axis { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.58rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; padding-top: 7px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }

    .mom-status { text-align: center; padding: 56px 0; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.88rem; }
    .mom-status.error { color: var(--red); }
    .mom-spinner {
      width: 26px; height: 26px; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-top-color: #ff6b35;
      border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; margin: 0 auto 12px;
    }

    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .alert-targets { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }
      .at-val { font-size: 0.75rem; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 390px) {
      .alert-targets { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 5px; }
    }

    /* ── DIVIDER ── */
    .section-divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); margin: 0 0 32px; }

    /* ── FOOTER ── */
    footer {
      text-align: center; padding: 24px 0;
      font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-muted); border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    /* ── FADE IN ── */
    @keyframes fadeUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .fade-in { animation: fadeUp 0.3s ease both; }

    /* ── App tabs: show one section at a time (all screen sizes) ── */
    body.tabs .tabbable { display: none; }
    body.tabs .tabbable.tab-active { display: block; animation: fadeUp 0.25s ease; }
    body.tabs .section-divider { display: none; }

    /* ── MOMENTUM ALERTS ── */
    --orange: #ff6b35;
    --orange-dim: #1a0c06;

    /* ── MOBILE TOP TAB STRIP (visible on first load) ── */
    .mobile-top-tabs { display: none; }

    /* ── MOBILE BOTTOM NAV ── */
    .mobile-bottom-nav {
      display: none;
      position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200;
      background: rgba(6,11,20,0.97);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 6px 0 max(8px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
    }
    .mobile-bottom-nav .nav-items {
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch;
      max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 4px;
    }
    .mbn-item {
      flex: 1; min-width: 0;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px;
      padding: 6px 1px; border-radius: 12px; text-decoration: none;
      color: var(--text-dim); transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s, transform 0.1s;
      -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    }
    /* The Search item is a <button> — strip native chrome so it matches the links. */
    .mbn-action { background: none; border: none; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; }
    .mbn-item:active { transform: scale(0.92); }
    .mbn-item.active { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); }
    .mbn-icon  { font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 1; }
    .mbn-label { display: none; }   /* icon-only bottom bar — labels via aria-label */

    /* ── TABLET (≤1024px) ── */
    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .page { padding: 20px 20px 40px; }
      .factor-bars { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 4px; }
    }

    /* ── MOBILE (≤640px) ── */
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      /* Show bottom nav */
      .mobile-bottom-nav { display: block; }
      body { padding-bottom: 72px; }

      /* Top tab strip — horizontally scrollable pills, sticky under header */
      .mobile-top-tabs {
        display: flex; gap: 7px;
        position: sticky; top: 52px; z-index: 90;
        background: rgba(6,11,20,0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        padding: 9px 12px;
        overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      }
      .mobile-top-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
      .mtt-item {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
        padding: 7px 13px; border-radius: 20px; text-decoration: none;
        color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface);
        font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap;
        transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.1s;
      }
      .mtt-item:active { transform: scale(0.94); }
      .mtt-item .mtt-ic { font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1; }
      .mtt-item.active {
        color: #06121f; background: var(--green); border-color: var(--green);
        box-shadow: 0 2px 10px -2px #10d98a66;
      }

      /* App-style tabs: mobile-specific section-label tweaks */
      body.tabs .section-label .label-meta { display: inline; }
      body.tabs .section-label h2 { font-size: 0.95rem; }
      body.tabs .page { padding-top: 12px; }

      /* Header — keep the action buttons; drop the secondary status cluster so the
         right column fits a 390px screen (the clock is already hidden on mobile). */
      header { padding: 0 12px; height: 52px; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: 10px; }
      .header-nav { display: none; }
      #live-clock, .market-status { display: none; }
      .header-right { gap: 6px; min-width: 0; }
      .hdr-btn { padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 0.68rem; }
      #cmdk-btn { display: none; }   /* search lives in the bottom nav on mobile */
      .logo-text { font-size: 0.85rem; }

      /* Page */
      .page { padding: 16px 14px 80px; }

      /* Section labels */
      .section-label h2 { font-size: 0.68rem; }
      .section-label .label-meta { display: none; }
      .section-label { margin-bottom: 14px; }

      /* Sector tiles */
      .sector-tile { min-width: 76px; padding: 8px 10px; }
      .sector-tile .st-sym  { font-size: 0.68rem; }
      .sector-tile .st-pct  { font-size: 0.82rem; }

      /* News cards */
      .news-card { padding: 12px 12px; gap: 10px; }
      .news-col-head h3 { font-size: 0.65rem; }
      .n-title { font-size: 0.83rem; }
      .n-desc  { font-size: 0.73rem; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; }
      .n-source { font-size: 0.6rem; }
      .news-list { gap: 7px; }

      /* Top pick card */
      .top-pick-card { padding: 16px 16px; }
      .tp-ticker { font-size: 1.4rem; }
      .tp-circle { width: 58px; height: 58px; }
      .tp-num    { font-size: 1.2rem; }
      .tp-thesis { font-size: 0.82rem; }

      /* Factor bars — 1 column */
      .factor-bars { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 4px; }
      .fb-label { font-size: 0.62rem; }

      /* Pick cards */
      .picks-grid { gap: 8px; }
      .pick-card  { padding: 12px 14px; gap: 10px; }
      .pc-circle  { width: 38px; height: 38px; font-size: 0.82rem; }
      .pc-ticker  { font-size: 0.95rem; }
      .pc-thesis  { font-size: 0.75rem; }

      /* Trends */
      .trend-card, .pred-card { padding: 12px 14px; gap: 10px; }
      .t-theme, .p-statement  { font-size: 0.83rem; }
      .t-desc, .p-basis       { font-size: 0.73rem; }

      /* Options cards */
      .opt-card    { padding: 14px 14px; }
      .opt-ticker  { font-size: 0.95rem; }
      .opt-metrics { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6px; }
      .opt-metrics .opt-metric:last-child { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
      .opt-activity { font-size: 0.74rem; }
      .opt-trade-value { font-size: 0.82rem; }
      .om-val { font-size: 0.78rem; }

      /* Accuracy bar */
      .accuracy-bar { padding: 8px 10px; }
      .acc-detail   { display: none; }

      /* Pred actions */
      .pred-btn { font-size: 0.62rem; padding: 3px 7px; }

      /* Dividers */
      .section-divider { margin: 0 0 24px; }

      /* Refresh buttons */
      .refresh-btn { font-size: 0.65rem; padding: 4px 8px; }
    }

    /* ── SMALL MOBILE (≤390px) ── */
    @media (max-width: 390px) {
      .page { padding: 14px 12px 80px; }
      .top-pick-inner { grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr; }
      .tp-circle { width: 50px; height: 50px; }
      .opt-metrics { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .opt-metrics .opt-metric:last-child { grid-column: auto; }
      .sector-tile { min-width: 68px; }
      /* Drop the wordmark so the header (logo + action buttons) fits narrow phones;
         the "M" logo icon stays. Prevents whole-page horizontal overflow. */
      .logo-text { display: none; }
    }

    /* ── DESKTOP ENHANCEMENTS (≥1280px) ── */
    @media (min-width: 1280px) {
      .factor-bars { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .news-grid   { gap: 24px; }
      .picks-grid  { gap: 16px; }
      .opt-grid    { gap: 16px; }
    }

    /* ── TOUCH / INTERACTION ── */
    @media (hover: none) {
      /* Remove hover effects on touch — use active instead */
      .news-card:hover, .pick-card:hover, .trend-card:hover,
      .pred-card:hover, .opt-card:hover { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); }
      .news-card:active  { background: var(--card-hover); }
      .pick-card:active  { background: var(--card-hover); }
      .trend-card:active { background: var(--card-hover); }
      .pred-card:active  { background: var(--card-hover); }
      .opt-card:active   { background: var(--card-hover); }
    }

    /* Improve tap target size for all interactive elements */
    button, a { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
    .summarize-btn, .refresh-btn, .hdr-btn, .pred-btn {
      touch-action: manipulation;
    }

    /* ── Skeleton loaders ── */
    .skel-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 14px; }
    @media (max-width: 860px) { .skel-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }
    .skel { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 18px; }
    .skel::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; transform: translateX(-100%); background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), transparent); animation: shimmer 1.3s infinite; }
    @keyframes shimmer { 100% { transform: translateX(100%); } }
    .skel-line { height: 10px; border-radius: 5px; background: var(--surface); margin: 9px 0; }

    /* ── Strategy backtest ── */
    .bt-note { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .bt-view-btn { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; padding: 5px 10px; cursor: pointer; }
    .bt-view-btn.active { color: #8a6dff; border-color: #8a6dff66; background: #8a6dff14; }
    .bt-verdict { margin: 4px 0 14px; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.5; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .bt-verdict.pass { background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .bt-verdict.fail { background: var(--amber-dim); border-color: #f0a83244; }
    .bt-ic-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.7fr 0.9fr 1.2fr; gap: 6px; align-items: center; font-size: 0.74rem; padding: 5px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .bt-ic-row.head { font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .bt-ic-bar { height: 6px; border-radius: 3px; background: var(--border); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .bt-ic-fill { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 50%; }
    .bt-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 14px; }
    @media (max-width: 760px) { .bt-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); } }
    .bt-card { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .bt-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0; height: 2px; }
    .bt-card.breakout::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10d98a, #06c4d4, #10d98a); }
    .bt-card.setup::before    { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0a832, #ff9f1c, #f0a832); }
    .bt-card.early::before    { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8a6dff, #06c4d4, #8a6dff); }
    .bt-tier { font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; }
    .bt-n { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; }
    .bt-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 6px; font-size: 0.74rem; padding: 6px 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .bt-row span { text-align: right; }
    .bt-row span:first-child { text-align: left; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
    .bt-head { border-top: none; }
    .bt-head span { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.56rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .bt-row .pos { color: var(--green); } .bt-row .neg { color: var(--red); } .bt-med { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .bt-eff { margin-top: 18px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; }
    .bt-eff-head { font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .bt-eff-sub { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.45; }
    .bt-eff-sub b { color: var(--text); }
    .bt-eff-row { grid-template-columns: 1.7fr 0.8fr 0.8fr 0.9fr 0.9fr; }
    .bt-reco { margin-top: 12px; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #8aa6c8; line-height: 1.5; background: var(--green-dim); border: 1px solid #10d98a33; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; }
    .bt-reco b { color: var(--green); }

    /* Decay curves — hold-window chips + per-type rows (roadmap Step 2). */
    .cx-hold { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .cx-hold i { font-weight: 400; opacity: 0.8; }
    .cx-hold.ok   { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .cx-hold.prov { color: #06c4d4; background: rgba(6,196,212,0.1); border-color: #06c4d444; }
    .cx-hold.bad  { color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); border-color: #ef505044; }
    .cx-hold.wait { color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); border-color: var(--border); }
    .cx-card-hold { margin-top: 10px; }
    .cx-decay-row { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 12px 0 6px; }
    .cx-decay-row:first-of-type { border-top: none; }
    .cx-decay-hd { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .cx-decay-nm { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); }
    .cx-decay-n { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-left: auto; }
    .cx-decay-chart { max-width: 340px; }
    .cx-decay-empty { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-dim); padding: 6px 0; }
    .bt-metrics { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0 14px; }
    .bt-m { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; font-size: 0.72rem; padding: 6px 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .bt-m span { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
    .bt-m b { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-weight: 800; }
    .bt-m b.pos { color: var(--green); } .bt-m b.neg { color: var(--red); }
    .bt-regime { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 14px 0; line-height: 1.6; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px 14px; }
    .bt-regime b { font-weight: 700; }
    .bt-wf-row { grid-template-columns: 1.7fr 0.95fr 0.95fr 0.8fr 0.6fr; }
    .pf-panel { margin-top: 18px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; }
    .pf-chart { margin: 12px 0; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--bg); padding: 6px; }
    .pf-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 9px; }
    @media (max-width: 600px) { .pf-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
    .pf-stat { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; }
    .pf-stat span { display: block; font-size: 0.55rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .pf-stat b { font-size: 0.98rem; font-weight: 800; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .pf-stat b.pos { color: var(--green); } .pf-stat b.neg { color: var(--red); }
    .pf-stat i { display: block; font-size: 0.58rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-style: normal; margin-top: 1px; }

    /* Live market-regime banner */
    .scr-regime { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; flex-wrap: wrap; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 0.72rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .scr-regime.on  { background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a44; color: var(--green); }
    .scr-regime.off { background: var(--red-dim);   border-color: #ef505044; color: var(--red); }
    .scr-regime .rg-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; box-shadow: 0 0 6px currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .scr-regime b { font-weight: 800; }
    .scr-regime .rg-note { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; }

    /* ── Bearish-regime warning banner (screener + momentum tabs) ── */
    .regime-banner {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 11px;
      background: var(--red-dim); border: 1px solid #ef505066; border-left: 4px solid var(--red);
      border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 15px; margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .regime-banner .rb-ic { font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.2; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .regime-banner .rb-body { font-size: 0.76rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .regime-banner .rb-body b { color: var(--red); font-weight: 800; }
    .scr-score.downgraded { color: var(--amber); }
    .scr-bear-tag { font-size: 0.52rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); border: 1px solid #ef505044; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 5px; margin-top: 3px; display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap; }

    /* ── Custom Screener (Apex Runner) ── */
    .cx-strip { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .cx-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .cx-badge .cx-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; box-shadow: 0 0 6px currentColor; }
    .cx-badge.risk_on  { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a55; }
    .cx-badge.neutral  { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border-color: #f0a83255; }
    .cx-badge.risk_off { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border-color: #ef505055; }
    .cx-preset { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 12px; }
    .cx-preset b { color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .cx-ver { font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 11px; }
    .cx-pending { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--amber); font-weight: 700; }
    .cx-health { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 800; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .cx-health .cx-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; box-shadow: 0 0 6px currentColor; }
    .cx-health.healthy   { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); border-color: #10d98a55; }
    .cx-health.degrading { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); border-color: #f0a83255; }
    .cx-health.broken    { color: var(--red);   background: var(--red-dim);   border-color: #ef505055; }
    .cx-health.pending   { color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); }
    .cx-health-txt.healthy { color: var(--green); } .cx-health-txt.degrading { color: var(--amber); } .cx-health-txt.broken { color: var(--red); } .cx-health-txt.pending { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .cx-recal { font-size: 0.56rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #f0a832; background: var(--amber-dim); border: 1px solid #f0a83244; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 5px; margin-left: 4px; }
    .cx-narrtag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; color: #8a6dff; background: rgba(138,109,255,0.1); border: 1px solid #8a6dff44; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 11px; }
    /* Portfolio panel */
    .cx-portfolio:empty { display: none; }
    .cx-portfolio { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px 15px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .cx-pf-head { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 800; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
    .cx-pf-head b { color: #f0a832; }
    .cx-pf-ctrl { margin-left: auto; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .cx-pf-ctrl input { width: 72px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 5px; color: var(--text); padding: 3px 6px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .cx-pf-ctrl input:last-of-type { width: 48px; }
    .cx-pf-warn { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--amber); font-weight: 700; margin: 9px 0 4px; }
    .cx-pf-secs { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; margin: 10px 0; }
    .cx-pf-sec { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr 36px; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .cx-pf-sec b { color: var(--text); text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .cx-pf-bar { height: 6px; background: var(--surface); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; }
    .cx-pf-bar div { height: 100%; background: #06c4d4; border-radius: 3px; }
    .cx-pf-sz-h { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; margin: 10px 0 6px; }
    .cx-pf-table td:first-child { text-align: left; }
    .cx-pf-table td, .cx-pf-table th { text-align: right; }
    .cx-ex-table td:first-child { text-align: left; }
    .cx-ex-table td, .cx-ex-table th { text-align: right; }
    .cx-ex-best td { background: var(--green-dim); font-weight: 800; }
    .cx-ex-pos { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .cx-ex-neg { color: var(--red); }
    /* How-to-use modal */
    .cx-help-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 500; background: rgba(3,7,14,0.78); backdrop-filter: blur(6px); display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; padding: 5vh 16px; overflow-y: auto; animation: fadeUp 0.2s ease; }
    .cx-help-backdrop[hidden] { display: none; }
    .cx-help-card { position: relative; max-width: 640px; width: 100%; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 16px; padding: 26px 26px 22px; box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
    .cx-help-x { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; }
    .cx-help-x:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .cx-help-card h2 { font-size: 1.15rem; margin: 0 36px 6px 0; color: #f0a832; }
    .cx-help-card h3 { font-size: 0.9rem; margin: 18px 0 7px; color: var(--text); }
    .cx-help-lead { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.55; margin: 0 0 14px; }
    .cx-help-rule { font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5; background: var(--amber-dim); border: 1px solid #f0a83244; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .cx-help-ol, .cx-help-ul { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.55; padding-left: 20px; margin: 4px 0; }
    .cx-help-ol li, .cx-help-ul li { margin-bottom: 7px; }
    .cx-help-card b { color: var(--text); }
    /* 📚 Learn teaching layer */
    .learn-term { border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--cyan); cursor: help; }
    .learn-term:hover { color: var(--cyan); }
    .lrn-group-h { font-size: 0.68rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--cyan); margin: 20px 0 2px; font-weight: 800; }
    .lrn-item { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 11px 4px; border-radius: 8px; }
    .lrn-item h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text); margin: 0 0 4px; }
    .lrn-plain { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.5; }
    .lrn-why, .lrn-pro { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 4px; }
    .lrn-why b { color: var(--amber, #f59e0b); }
    .lrn-pro b { color: var(--green); }
    .lrn-item.hl { background: var(--cyan-dim); border-color: transparent; }
    .cx-help-foot { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.55; margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .cx-help-p { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.55; margin: 6px 0; }
    .cx-cmp { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; margin: 10px 0; }
    .cx-cmp-col { background: var(--card, #1a1a22); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px 13px; }
    .cx-cmp-h { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .cx-cmp-q { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.45; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .cx-cmp .cx-help-ul { margin: 0; padding-left: 18px; }
    @media (max-width: 560px) { .cx-cmp { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

    .cx-tier-head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 9px; margin: 20px 0 11px; }
    .cx-tier-head:first-child { margin-top: 4px; }
    .cx-tier-name { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
    .cx-tier-head.apex   .cx-tier-name { color: #f0a832; }
    .cx-tier-head.loaded .cx-tier-name { color: #06c4d4; }
    .cx-tier-head.watch  .cx-tier-name { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .cx-tier-sub { font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; }

    .cx-card { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px; padding: 15px 16px 14px; position: relative; min-width: 0; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }
    .cx-card.apex   { border-color: #f0a83255; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #f0a83222; }
    .cx-card.loaded { border-color: #06c4d433; }
    .cx-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 11px; min-width: 0; }
    .cx-top > div:first-child { min-width: 0; }
    .cx-tk-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; min-width: 0; }
    .cx-ticker { font-size: 1.08rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
    .cx-tierbadge { font-size: 0.56rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 5px; padding: 2px 7px; }
    .cx-tierbadge.apex   { color: #f0a832; background: var(--amber-dim); border: 1px solid #f0a83244; }
    .cx-tierbadge.loaded { color: #06c4d4; background: rgba(6,196,212,0.1); border: 1px solid #06c4d444; }
    .cx-tierbadge.watch  { color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .cx-company { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 3px; }
    .cx-score-col { margin-left: auto; text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .cx-score { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #f0a832; }
    .cx-score small { font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .cx-price { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 4px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .cx-chg { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .cx-chg.up { color: var(--green); } .cx-chg.down { color: var(--red); }

    .cx-pillars { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 7px 16px; margin: 13px 0 11px; }
    .cx-pill { }
    .cx-pill-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.62rem; margin-bottom: 3px; }
    .cx-pill-top span { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; }
    .cx-pill-top b { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-weight: 800; }
    .cx-pill-track { height: 5px; border-radius: 3px; background: var(--surface); overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
    .cx-pill-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 3px; }
    .cx-pill.p1 .cx-pill-fill { background: #10d98a; }
    .cx-pill.p2 .cx-pill-fill { background: #06c4d4; }
    .cx-pill.p3 .cx-pill-fill { background: #f0a832; }
    .cx-pill.p4 .cx-pill-fill { background: #8a6dff; }
    .cx-pill-wt { font-size: 0.55rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
    .cx-weak { font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--amber); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 9px; }
    .cx-narrative { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.45; margin-top: 10px; border-left: 2px solid var(--border); padding-left: 9px; }
    .of-warn { font-size: 0.7rem; line-height: 1.45; margin-top: 8px; padding: 7px 9px; border-radius: 6px;
      color: var(--amber, #f0a832); background: var(--amber-dim, #2a210a); border: 1px solid #f0a83244; }
    .of-warn b { color: var(--amber, #f0a832); }
    .of-action { font-size: 0.7rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 8px; padding: 7px 9px; border-radius: 6px;
      color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); border-left: 2px solid #06c4d4; }
    .of-action b { color: var(--text); }
    .xa-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; margin-top: 9px; }
    .xa-chip { font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg); }
    .xa-conv { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 9px; font-size: 0.62rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .xa-conv-lb { white-space: nowrap; }
    .xa-conv-track { flex: 1; height: 5px; border-radius: 3px; background: var(--bg-hi); overflow: hidden; }
    .xa-conv-fill { height: 100%; }
    .xa-levels { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; margin-top: 9px; font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .xa-levels b { color: var(--text); }
    .xa-ai-lb { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; }   /* short label — safe to keep on one line */
    .xa-caution { font-size: 0.64rem; line-height: 1.4; margin-top: 4px; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }   /* full-sentence flag — MUST wrap (xa-conv-lb is nowrap → grid blowout) */
    .cx-narr-str { color: var(--amber); font-weight: 700; }

    /* Model panel */
    .cx-mp-sec { margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .cx-mp-sec h4 { font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; margin: 0 0 7px; color: var(--text); }
    .cx-mp-p { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; margin: 0 0 8px; }
    .cx-preset-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.68rem; }
    .cx-preset-table th, .cx-preset-table td { text-align: center; padding: 5px 6px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .cx-preset-table th { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
    .cx-preset-table td:first-child, .cx-preset-table th:first-child { text-align: left; color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; }
    .cx-preset-table td.active { color: #f0a832; font-weight: 800; background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .cx-preset-table col.active { }
    .cx-log { font-size: 0.64rem; color: var(--text-dim); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1.6; }

    /* ── Markets hub sub-nav ── */
    .hub-sub { display: flex; gap: 7px; margin-bottom: 18px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .hub-sub-btn {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim);
      border-radius: 9px; padding: 9px 15px; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
      transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .hub-sub-btn:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .hub-sub-btn.active { background: #10d98a; color: #06121f; border-color: #10d98a; }
    /* Shared market-tape badge (shown on all screener tabs) */
    #tape-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 13px; margin-bottom: 16px; background: var(--card); font-size: 0.78rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    #tape-badge .tb-ic { font-size: 1.05rem; }
    #tape-badge b { color: var(--text); }
    #tape-badge .tb-desc { color: var(--text-dim); }
    #tape-badge .tb-reg { margin-left: auto; font-size: 0.66rem; color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 20px; padding: 2px 9px; }
    #tape-badge .tb-fit { display: block; margin-top: 3px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; }
    #tape-badge .tb-fit.good { color: var(--green); }
    #tape-badge .tb-fit.bad { color: var(--amber, #f59e0b); }
    /* Per-screener trust badge */
    #trust-badge { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 9px 13px; margin-bottom: 12px; background: var(--card); font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.5; }
    #trust-badge .trust-dot { display: inline-block; width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 6px; vertical-align: middle; }
    #trust-badge .trust-one { color: var(--text-dim); }
    /* 🏠 Today home */
    .today-cta { background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--cyan); color: var(--cyan); border-radius: 6px; padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; margin-left: 6px; }
    .today-cta:hover { background: var(--cyan-dim); }
    .today-links { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 14px; }
    .today-link { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); border-radius: 9px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }
    .today-link:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .today-idea { cursor: pointer; }
    .today-idea:hover { background: var(--card-hover); }
    /* Simple/Expert progressive disclosure — Simple hides the dense expert surfaces */
    body.simple .fade-caveats,
    body.simple .expert-only,
    body.simple .header-nav [data-tab="lab"],
    body.simple .mobile-top-tabs [data-tab="lab"],
    body.simple .mobile-bottom-nav [data-tab="lab"] { display: none !important; }
    .hub-sub-div { width: 100%; font-size: .64rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .05em; color: var(--muted,#94a3b8); opacity: .8; padding: .25rem .1rem .1rem; margin-top: .15rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06); }
    .hub-sub-div:first-child { border-top: none; margin-top: 0; }
    @media (max-width: 640px) { .hub-sub-div { display: none; } }
    body.expert #mode-btn { color: var(--cyan); border-color: #06c4d455; }
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .hub-sub { flex-wrap: nowrap; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none; gap: 6px; }
      .hub-sub::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
      .hub-sub-btn { flex: 0 0 auto; }
    }

    /* ── VISUAL POLISH ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    body {
      background:
        radial-gradient(1100px 520px at 50% -8%, #0c1830 0%, rgba(12,24,48,0) 60%),
        var(--bg);
      background-attachment: fixed;
    }
    ::selection { background: #10d98a40; }

    /* Refined scrollbars (desktop) */
    *::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 10px; height: 10px; }
    *::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #1c2c4a; border-radius: 6px; border: 2px solid var(--bg); }
    *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #2a4068; }

    /* Card lift on hover (pointer devices only) */
    .alert-card, .pick-card, .opt-card, .scr-card, .news-card, .trend-card, .pred-card, .top-pick-card {
      transition: transform 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
    }
    @media (hover: hover) {
      .alert-card:hover, .pick-card:hover, .opt-card:hover, .scr-card:hover,
      .news-card:hover, .trend-card:hover, .pred-card:hover {
        transform: translateY(-2px);
        box-shadow: 0 10px 26px -14px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
      }
    }

    /* Header gets a soft depth shadow */
    header { box-shadow: 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.02), 0 6px 20px -16px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); }

    /* Section labels: a touch more presence */
    .section-label h2 { letter-spacing: -0.01em; }

    /* Bigger, comfier touch targets on phones */
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .refresh-btn, .hdr-btn, .pred-btn { padding: 7px 11px; font-size: 0.7rem; }
      .chart-toggle { padding: 11px; }
      .scr-filter { padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; }
      .alert-card, .opt-card, .scr-card { padding: 16px 16px; }
      .mom-col-head { font-size: 0.86rem; padding: 11px 13px; }
      .scr-tune-toggle { padding: 12px 14px; }
    }

    /* Overheated (fade) tab */
    .fade-head { margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .fade-regime { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .fade-tagline { font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--text); }
    .fade-track { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b4a14, #ff6b4a06); border: 1px solid #ff6b4a44; border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px 20px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .fade-track-pending { background: var(--surface); border-color: var(--border); }
    .fade-track-big { font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ff7a5c; line-height: 1.1; }
    .fade-track-big span { display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 3px; }
    .fade-track-pending .fade-track-big { font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--text); }
    .fade-track-sub { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.5; }
    .fade-list { display: grid; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .fade-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px 15px; }
    .fade-card-top { display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: flex-start; }
    .fade-score { flex: 0 0 auto; width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 11px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--c) 16%, transparent); color: var(--c); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--c) 45%, transparent); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; }
    .fade-score span { font-size: 0.5rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.85; }
    .fade-id { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .fade-tk { font-size: 0.98rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .fade-sec { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .fade-badge { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }
    .fade-thesis { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 4px; line-height: 1.45; }
    .fade-card-stats { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 16px; align-items: center; margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 9px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .fade-adv { margin-left: auto; }
    .fade-adv summary { cursor: pointer; color: var(--accent, #7c5cff); font-size: 0.72rem; list-style: none; }
    .fade-adv summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .fade-adv-body { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 6px; max-width: 460px; }
    .fade-caveats { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.6; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 13px 15px; }

    /* Trend Rider traffic light */
    .tr-light-wrap { display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px 22px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .tr-light { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; background: #0c1322; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 11px; flex: 0 0 auto; }
    .tr-lamp { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; transition: all .3s; }
    .tr-light-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .tr-light-status { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .tr-light-desc { font-size: 0.86rem; color: var(--text); margin-top: 2px; }
    .tr-light-score { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 6px; }
    .tr-light-cmp { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 10px; }
    .tr-light-cmp span { font-size: 0.66rem; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 20px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); }
    .tr-light-cmp span.on { color: var(--green); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--green) 40%, transparent); }
    .tr-light-cmp span.off { color: var(--red); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--red) 40%, transparent); }
    .rot-panel-pending { opacity: 0.9; }
    @media (max-width: 520px) { .tr-light-wrap { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px; } .tr-light { flex-direction: row; } }
    /* Trend Rider how-to caption */
    .tr-howto { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .tr-howto-head { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 9px; }
    .tr-howto-now { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid; margin-bottom: 11px; }
    .tr-howto ol { margin: 0; padding-left: 20px; }
    .tr-howto li { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 5px 0; line-height: 1.5; }
    .tr-howto li b { color: var(--text); }
    /* Collapsible novice guide auto-injected at the top of each screener tab. */
    .tr-howto-auto { padding: 0; overflow: hidden; }
    .tr-howto-auto > summary { list-style: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 0.9rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; user-select: none; }
    .tr-howto-auto > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .tr-howto-auto > summary::after { content: '▾ tap to expand'; margin-left: auto; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-dim); opacity: 0.8; }
    .tr-howto-auto[open] > summary::after { content: '▴ tap to hide'; }
    .tr-howto-auto[open] > summary { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .tr-howto-auto > ol { padding: 4px 20px 8px 36px; }
    .howto-start-link { display: block; margin: 0 16px 14px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #34c75955; background: #34c7591a; color: #34c759; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-align: center; }
    .howto-start-link:hover { background: #34c7592e; }
    .howto-start-link b { color: #34c759; }
    /* Day Trade pick cards (with trade plan) */
    /* Hard guard: the Day Trade content must never overflow its column (was cutting
       off the right side on narrow/zoomed screens — e.g. a 15" laptop). */
    #dt-container { max-width: 100%; overflow-x: clip; }
    #dt-container .rot-panel, #dt-container .dt-card, #dt-container .dt-best-card { max-width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; }
    .dt-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 9px 12px; margin: 7px 0; }
    /* min-width:0 lets the info column shrink & wrap instead of shoving the price (.dt-now) off the right edge */
    .dt-card-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 0.9rem; }
    .dt-card-top > span:first-child { min-width: 0; flex: 1 1 auto; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }
    .dt-card-top > .dt-now { flex: 0 0 auto; }
    .dt-card-sub, .dt-card-plan { overflow-wrap: break-word; }
    .dt-sec { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.74rem; }
    .dt-star { font-size: 0.82rem; cursor: help; }
    .dt-mv { color: var(--green); font-weight: 600; }
    .dt-dim { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 400; }
    .dt-now { font-size: 0.95rem; white-space: nowrap; }
    .dt-now [data-dt-price] { color: var(--text); }
    .dt-rank { display: inline-block; min-width: 22px; text-align: center; font-weight: 800; font-size: .74rem; color: var(--text-dim); border: 1px solid var(--border-hi, var(--border)); border-radius: 5px; padding: 1px 5px; vertical-align: middle; }
    .dt-rank.dt-rank-top { color: #0b0f17; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#22c55e,#4ade80); border-color: transparent; }
    .dt-price-asof { font-size: .72rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 2px 0 6px; }
    .dt-price-asof .live-dot { display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #22c55e; margin-right: 5px; vertical-align: middle; }
    .dt-card-sub { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text); margin-top: 2px; }
    .dt-card-plan { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text); margin-top: 6px; padding-top: 6px; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); line-height: 1.5; }
    .dt-card-plan b { color: var(--amber, #f59e0b); }
    .dt-note { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); border-left: 3px solid #f59e0b; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 11px; margin: 8px 0; line-height: 1.5; }
    /* 🎲 Crowd — prediction-market rows */
    .crowd-row { padding: 11px 14px; }
    .crowd-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .crowd-venue { font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .02em; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; text-transform: uppercase; }
    .crowd-heat { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; }
    .crowd-title { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .crowd-link { color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--border); }
    .crowd-link:hover { color: #14b8a6; }
    .crowd-chip { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; padding: 1px 8px; margin: 2px 4px 0 0; white-space: nowrap; }
    /* 🧭 Brief */
    .brief-sig { cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s; border-radius: 6px; }
    .brief-sig:hover { background: var(--surface); }
    .brief-eq { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.72rem; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 3px 9px; margin: 3px 5px 0 0; }
    .brief-eq.eq-fav { border-left: 3px solid var(--green); }
    .brief-eq.eq-pre { border-left: 3px solid var(--red); }
    /* 🔔 Alerts */
    .nav-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 16px; height: 16px; padding: 0 4px; margin-left: 5px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--red); color: #fff; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; vertical-align: middle; }
    .alert-row { cursor: pointer; }
    .alert-row.alert-unread { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--amber, #f59e0b) 8%, var(--card)); }
    .mbn-item .nav-badge, .mtt-item .nav-badge { position: relative; top: -6px; margin-left: 2px; }
    /* 🩺 System health banner */
    .health-banner { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--amber, #f59e0b) 14%, var(--card)); border: 1px solid var(--amber, #f59e0b); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--text); position: relative; }
    .health-banner .health-x { position: absolute; top: 6px; right: 8px; background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-dim); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 2px 6px; }
    .health-banner .health-x:hover { color: var(--text); }
    /* Auto-update prompt — fixed bar shown when a new deploy is detected. */
    #update-bar { position: fixed; left: 50%; bottom: 18px; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 9999; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px 10px 16px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border-hi, var(--border)); box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.35); font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--text); max-width: calc(100vw - 24px); }
    #update-bar .ub-msg { font-weight: 600; }
    #update-bar .ub-reload { background: var(--green); color: #04140c; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 6px 14px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.82rem; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; }
    #update-bar .ub-reload:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); }
    #update-bar .ub-x { background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-dim); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 2px 6px; line-height: 1; }
    #update-bar .ub-x:hover { color: var(--text); }
    /* 📈 Live price overlay on screener cards */
    .live-px { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; margin-left: 7px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); white-space: nowrap; vertical-align: middle; }
    .live-px .live-ext { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 600; }
    .live-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; }
    .live-dot.live-regular { background: var(--green); }
    .live-dot.live-pre, .live-dot.live-post { background: var(--amber, #f59e0b); }
    .live-dot.live-closed { background: var(--text-dim); }
    .live-asof { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); margin: -2px 0 8px; white-space: nowrap; }
    .live-asof .live-dot { animation: live-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes live-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.35; } }
    /* ⭐ Opportunities (Today home centerpiece) */
    .opp-wrap { margin: 4px 0; }
    .opp-card { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px 15px; margin-top: 9px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .15s, background .15s; }
    .opp-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); background: var(--card-hover); }
    .opp-head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; }
    .opp-id { min-width: 0; }
    .opp-tk { font-size: 1.02rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .01em; }
    .opp-co { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .opp-conv { font-size: 0.82rem; white-space: nowrap; }
    .opp-badges { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin: 6px 0 5px; font-size: 0.7rem; }
    .opp-badge { font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .opp-badge.ghost-ghost { color: #9b8cff; border-color: #9b8cff66; }
    .opp-badge.ghost-stalking { color: var(--cyan); border-color: #06c4d466; }
    .opp-badge.ghost-watch { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .opp-thesis { font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .opp-levels { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 7px 10px; background: var(--surface); border-radius: 8px; }
    .opp-levels .opp-lk { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.68rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .03em; }
    .opp-levels .opp-rr { margin-left: auto; color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .opp-expert { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.74rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--text); border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); padding-top: 7px; }
    .opp-foot { font-size: 0.7rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 10px; }
    /* ⭐ Opportunities tab — cap-size toggle */
    .opp-scope-row { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .opp-scope-btn { font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); cursor: pointer; transition: all .12s; }
    .opp-scope-btn:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .opp-scope-btn.active { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a66; }
    .opp-scope-hint { font-size: 0.68rem; margin-left: 4px; }
    /* ⚡ Quick Hit — cross-cap Top 5 shortlist */
    .qh-caps { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin: 10px 0 2px; }
    .qh-caps-h { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .qh-capchip { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .qh-capchip.on { cursor: pointer; transition: all .12s; }
    .qh-capchip.on:hover { background: var(--card-hover); filter: brightness(1.1); }
    .qh-capchip.off { color: var(--text-dim); opacity: .6; }
    .qh-card { border-left: 3px solid #fbbf24; }
    .qh-top { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; }
    .qh-rank { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fbbf24; min-width: 1.6em; }
    .qh-cap { font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); white-space: nowrap; }
    .qh-top .opp-id { flex: 1 1 auto; }
    .qh-crossconf { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--green); margin: 6px 0 2px; }
    .qh-refs { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 9px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); font-size: 0.7rem; }
    .qh-refs-h { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
    .qh-ref { font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; transition: all .12s; }
    .qh-ref:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); background: var(--card-hover); }
    .qh-ref-ai { color: var(--cyan); border-color: #06c4d444; }
    /* ⚡ Quick Hit mover leaderboards (day movers + week/month momentum) */
    .qh-mv-wrap { margin-top: 4px; }
    .qh-mv-live { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dim); white-space: nowrap; }
    .qh-mv-live .live-dot { margin-right: 3px; }
    .qh-mv-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; margin-top: 8px; }
    .qh-mv-cols { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; margin-top: 8px; }
    .qh-mv-col { flex: 1 1 260px; min-width: 0; }
    .qh-mv-colh { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-dim); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .qh-mv-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .qh-mv-row + .qh-mv-row { margin-top: 2px; }
    .qh-mv-rank { font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-dim); min-width: 1.4em; text-align: right; }
    .qh-mv-tk { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.82rem; }
    .qh-mv-co { flex: 1 1 auto; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; min-width: 0; }
    .qh-mv-px { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text); white-space: nowrap; }
    .qh-mv-day { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; opacity: 0.9; }
    .qh-mv-day.up { color: var(--green); }
    .qh-mv-day.down { color: var(--red); }
    .qh-mv-ret { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.82rem; white-space: nowrap; }
    .qh-mv-ret.up { color: var(--green); }
    .qh-mv-ret.down { color: var(--red); }
    .qh-mv-srcs { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; flex-shrink: 0; justify-content: flex-end; }
    .qh-mv-src { font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-dim); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: all .12s; }
    .qh-mv-src:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); color: var(--text); }
    /* ⭐ Opportunity proximity-to-trigger line */
    .opp-prox { font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 8px; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface); }
    .opp-prox.prox-coiled { border-left: 3px solid var(--green); }
    .opp-prox.prox-now { border-left: 3px solid var(--cyan); }
    .opp-prox.prox-ext { border-left: 3px solid var(--amber, #f59e0b); }
    .opp-badge.opp-sleevea { color: #f0a832; border-color: #f0a83266; }
    /* 🔥 Leading-themes strip on Opportunities */
    .opp-themes { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin: 8px 0 2px; }
    .opp-themes-h { font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f0a832; }
    .opp-theme-chip { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in srgb, #f0a832 12%, var(--card)); border: 1px solid #f0a83255; color: var(--text); }
    .opp-theme-chip .opp-theme-mom { color: var(--green); }
    .opp-themes-hint { font-size: 0.66rem; width: 100%; margin-top: 2px; }
    /* 🤖 AI Screeners strip on Opportunities */
    .opp-ai { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; margin: 6px 0 2px; }
    .opp-ai-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; padding: 5px 9px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .opp-ai-tk { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.82rem; min-width: 52px; }
    .opp-ai-badges { display: inline-flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; }
    .opp-ai-src { font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in srgb, #8b5cf6 12%, var(--card)); border: 1px solid #8b5cf655; color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; }
    .opp-ai-note { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); flex: 1 1 200px; }
    .opp-badge.opp-theme-lead { color: #f0a832; border-color: #f0a83266; background: color-mix(in srgb, #f0a832 8%, var(--card)); }
    /* Smart-money / fundamental signal chips on Opportunities */
    .opp-sigs { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; margin-top: 8px; }
    .opp-sig { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .opp-sig.sig-growth { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .opp-sig.sig-insider { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a66; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .opp-sig.sig-cat { color: var(--cyan); border-color: #06c4d444; }
    .opp-size { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 6px; }
    .opp-size b { color: var(--text); }
    .opp-track { font-size: 0.72rem; margin-top: 6px; }
    .opp-track.opp-pos { color: var(--green); }
    .opp-track.opp-neg { color: var(--red); }
    .opp-sig.sig-rs-lead { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a55; }
    .opp-sig.sig-rs-lag { color: #f0a832; border-color: #f0a83255; }
    .opp-sig.sig-pp { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a66; background: var(--green-dim); }
    .opp-sig.sig-rs2 { color: var(--green); border-color: #10d98a44; }
    .opp-sig.sig-hi { color: var(--cyan); border-color: #06c4d444; }
    .opp-sig.sig-vcp, .opp-sig.sig-vdu, .opp-sig.sig-acc { color: var(--text-dim); }
    /* 🏆 Algo Leaderboard */
    .lb-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 11px 14px; margin-top: 8px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; }
    .lb-rank { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; min-width: 28px; text-align: center; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .lb-mid { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .lb-name { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 700; }
    .lb-detail { font-size: 0.76rem; margin-top: 2px; }
    .lb-live { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); display: block; margin-top: 1px; }
    .lb-verdict { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .03em; white-space: nowrap; }

/* 🧬 Coil Radar — responsive card grid + calibration reasons */
.dt-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr)); gap: 8px; }
.coil-reasons li { margin: 1px 0; }
@media (max-width: 680px) { .dt-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.coil-rank { display: inline-block; min-width: 22px; text-align: center; font-weight: 800; font-size: .82rem; color: #c084fc; background: #a855f71a; border: 1px solid #a855f755; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 5px; margin-right: 3px; }

/* ⚡ Day Trade — relative-strength score, tier badge, and Today's Best Opportunities */
.dt-relscore { display: inline-block; min-width: 24px; text-align: center; font-weight: 800; font-size: .74rem; color: #0b0f17; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#f59e0b,#fbbf24); border-radius: 5px; padding: 1px 5px; vertical-align: middle; }
.dt-carry { display: inline-block; font-weight: 800; font-size: .68rem; border: 1px solid; border-radius: 5px; padding: 1px 5px; vertical-align: middle; }
.dt-tier-b { font-size: .64rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; border: 1px solid #475569; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0 3px; vertical-align: middle; }
.dt-best-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min(100%, 240px), 1fr)); gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; }
.dt-best-top { flex-wrap: wrap; }
.dt-best-card { min-width: 0; box-sizing: border-box; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }
.dt-best-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid #f59e0b44; border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 11px; }
.dt-best-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-size: .95rem; }
.dt-best-rank { font-weight: 800; color: #f59e0b; font-size: .85rem; }

/* 📡 Market Pulse — trending social/media distillations */
.pulse-grid { display: grid; gap: 9px; }
.pulse-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-left: 3px solid #ec4899; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 13px; }
.pulse-top { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 9px; }
.pulse-rank { font-weight: 800; color: #ec4899; font-size: .9rem; min-width: 26px; }
.pulse-head { flex: 1; font-size: .98rem; }
.pulse-vel { font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; }
.pulse-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 6px 0; font-size: .82rem; }
.pulse-tk { display: inline-block; background: #ec489922; color: #f9a8d4; border-radius: 5px; padding: 0 6px; font-weight: 700; font-size: .8rem; }
.pulse-sent { font-weight: 700; }
.pulse-pop { color: var(--text-dim); }
.pulse-bars { color: #ec4899; letter-spacing: -1px; }
.pulse-idea { font-size: .9rem; margin: 3px 0; }
.pulse-why { font-size: .86rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 3px 0; }
.pulse-caution { font-size: .82rem; color: var(--amber, #f59e0b); margin: 4px 0; }
.pulse-src { font-size: .78rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 4px; font-style: italic; }
.pulse-crowd { font-weight: 700; font-size: .8rem; }
.pulse-contra { font-size: .84rem; margin: 4px 0; padding: 5px 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: #ec489912; border-left: 2px solid #ec4899; }
/* Stage-2 (Fable) status chip + refined stamp in the header note */
.pulse-refining { display: inline-block; color: #ec4899; font-weight: 700; font-size: .82rem; animation: pulseGlow 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes pulseGlow { 0%, 100% { opacity: .55; } 50% { opacity: 1; } }
.pulse-refined-tag { display: inline-block; background: #ec489922; color: #f9a8d4; border-radius: 5px; padding: 0 7px; font-weight: 700; font-size: .78rem; }

/* 🔗 Read-Through — reuses .pulse-card/.pulse-grid; teal accent + tape/link badges */
#readthrough .pulse-card { border-left-color: #14b8a6; }
#readthrough .pulse-tk { background: #14b8a622; color: #5eead4; }
.rt-triggers { font-size: .84rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 8px 0 10px; }
.rt-link { font-weight: 700; }
.rt-from { color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 700; }
.rt-direct { color: #14b8a6; letter-spacing: -1px; }
.rt-tape { font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; }
.rt-fresh { color: var(--green); }
.rt-moved { color: var(--text-dim); }
.rt-unknown { color: var(--text-dim); }
.rt-dim { opacity: .62; }

/* Predict feedback loop — per-class live track-record badge + featured/demoted states.
   A PROVEN class glows; a DUD class is dimmed via .rt-dim and sorted last by calibSort. */
.pulse-calib { margin: 4px 0 2px; }
.calib { display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 7px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid transparent; white-space: nowrap; }
.calib-good { color: var(--green); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--green) 14%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--green) 40%, transparent); }
.calib-bad { color: var(--red); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--red) 12%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--red) 34%, transparent); }
.calib-cal { color: var(--text-dim); border-color: var(--border); }
.calib-feat { border-left-width: 3px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--green) 34%, transparent); }
.calib-feat .pulse-head b::before { content: "★ "; color: var(--green); }
.calib-legend { display: block; margin-top: 5px; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-dim); }

/* Layer 3 — AI conviction calibration headline (rank-IC of its own conviction score) */
.conv { display: inline-block; margin-top: 5px; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 7px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--border); white-space: nowrap; }
.conv-good { color: var(--green); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--green) 40%, transparent); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--green) 12%, transparent); }
.conv-bad { color: var(--red); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--red) 34%, transparent); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--red) 10%, transparent); }
.conv-cal { color: var(--text-dim); }

/* Live price + 3-session trend on predict-tab lead cards */
.pulse-pricebar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 5px 0 2px; min-height: 18px; }
.pulse-px { font-size: .86rem; font-weight: 700; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
.pulse-spark { display: inline-flex; width: 68px; height: 20px; opacity: .9; }
.pulse-spark svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.pulse-spark-chg { font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 700; }

/* 🕵️ Stealth (Anomaly) — reuses .pulse-card/.pulse-grid; violet accent */
#anomaly .pulse-card { border-left-color: #8b5cf6; }
.anom-meta { font-size: .82rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 6px 0 10px; }
.anom-move { font-size: .82rem; color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
.anom-class { font-size: .8rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; }
.anom-conf { letter-spacing: -1px; opacity: .8; }

/* 🧬 Biotech Radar — reuses .pulse-card/.pulse-grid; emerald accent */
#biotech .pulse-card { border-left-color: #10b981; }
.bio-score { font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 800; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid; border-radius: 6px; padding: 1px 7px; }
.bio-score-max { font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 600; opacity: .7; }
.bio-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; align-items: center; margin: 6px 0 2px; }
.bio-chip { font-size: .72rem; color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--surface-2, rgba(127,127,127,.12)); border-radius: 5px; padding: 1px 6px; white-space: nowrap; }
.bio-chip.bio-warn { color: #ef4444; background: rgba(239,68,68,.12); font-weight: 700; }
.bio-flags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; margin-top: 7px; }
.bio-flag { font-size: .7rem; color: #f59e0b; background: rgba(245,158,11,.12); border-radius: 5px; padding: 1px 6px; white-space: nowrap; }

/* 🌊 Second Wave — reuses .pulse-card/.pulse-grid; sky accent */
#secondwave .pulse-card { border-left-color: #0ea5e9; }
.sw-crowd { font-size: .8rem; color: var(--text-dim); }

/* 🌐 Cross-Asset — reuses .pulse-card/.pulse-grid; orange accent */
#crossasset .pulse-card { border-left-color: #f97316; }

/* 🎚️ Tone Shift — reuses .pulse-card/.pulse-grid; purple accent */
#toneshift .pulse-card { border-left-color: #a855f7; }

    /* ── 🎯 Unified decision command center (today.js) ── */
    .td-cc-wrap { margin-top: 10px; }
    .td-cc { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
    .td-refreshing { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-dim); background: rgba(148,163,184,.1); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 5px 10px; align-self: flex-start; }
    .td-head { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-left: 3px solid var(--green); border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px 14px; }
    .td-regime { font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .td-sectors { font-size: 0.72rem; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
    .td-sec-chip { border-radius: 5px; padding: 2px 7px; background: var(--surface); }
    .td-sec-chip.lead { color: var(--green); }
    .td-sec-chip.weak { color: var(--red); }
    .td-horizons { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; }
    .td-hz-h { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .td-hz-h .td-dim { font-weight: 400; }
    .td-empty { font-size: 0.76rem; padding: 8px 4px; }
    .td-card { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 11px; padding: 11px 13px; margin-bottom: 9px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .15s, background .15s; }
    .td-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); background: var(--card-hover); }
    .td-top { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 7px; }
    .td-rank { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 700; }
    .td-tk { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; }
    .td-co { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 0.72rem; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
    .td-score { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--cyan); }
    .td-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; margin: 7px 0; font-size: 0.68rem; }
    .td-chips > span { border-radius: 5px; padding: 2px 7px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text-dim); }
    .td-state.st-green { color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); }
    .td-state.st-amber { color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .td-state.st-red { color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); }
    .td-exec { color: var(--amber) !important; }
    .td-fam { font-weight: 600; }
    .td-fam.fam-trend { color: var(--green); }
    .td-fam.fam-earlyMomentum { color: var(--cyan); }
    .td-fam.fam-event { color: var(--amber, #f59e0b); }
    .td-fam.fam-intraday { color: #8a6dff; }
    .td-fam.fam-context { color: var(--text-dim); }
    .td-eviden { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 5px 0; }
    .td-eviden b { color: var(--text); }
    .td-warn { color: var(--amber); }
    .td-breadth-row { margin: 3px 0; min-height: 0; }
    .td-breadth-row:empty { display: none; }
    .td-breadth { font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; padding: .08em .45em; border-radius: 999px; }
    .td-breadth.br-wide { color: var(--green); background: rgba(34,197,94,.12); }
    .td-breadth.br-ok { color: var(--cyan); background: rgba(34,211,238,.12); }
    .td-breadth.br-thin { color: var(--text-dim); background: rgba(148,163,184,.12); }
    .td-levels { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-dim); margin: 6px 0; }
    .td-levels b { color: var(--text); }
    .td-rr { color: var(--cyan); }
    .td-hold { color: var(--text-muted); }
    /* Related-workspace strip + the single top-plays shortlist (#1) */
    .td-related { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; align-items: center; margin: 10px 0 4px; font-size: 0.72rem; }
    .td-rel { border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 999px; padding: 3px 11px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.72rem; transition: border-color .15s, color .15s; }
    .td-rel:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); color: var(--text); }
    .td-top-plays { margin: 14px 0; }
    .td-top-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 9px; }
    .td-foot { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 9px; align-items: center; font-size: 0.7rem; margin-top: 5px; }
    .td-track.td-pos { color: var(--green); }
    .td-track.td-neg { color: var(--red); }
    .td-ci { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.66rem; }
    .td-ver { color: var(--text-muted) !important; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .td-cat { color: var(--amber); }
    .td-dim { color: var(--text-muted); }
    .td-lanes, .td-events { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 13px; }
    .td-lanes-h { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .td-lane { margin-bottom: 7px; font-size: 0.72rem; }
    .td-lane-h { color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 3px; }
    .td-lane-tk, .td-evt { display: inline-block; background: var(--surface); border-radius: 5px; padding: 2px 7px; margin: 2px 4px 2px 0; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.7rem; }
    .td-evt { cursor: default; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .td-cc-foot { font-size: 0.72rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 4px; }
    .td-cc-foot b { color: var(--text-dim); }

    /* ── 🎯 Ranking-quality panel (Scoreboard #5) ── */
    .rq-panel .rq-verdict { font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.5; background: var(--surface); border-left: 3px solid var(--green); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 11px; margin: 8px 0; }
    .rq-bars { margin: 8px 0; }
    .rq-cap { font-size: 0.72rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .rq-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.74rem; margin: 3px 0; }
    .rq-band { flex: 0 0 92px; }
    .rq-track { flex: 1; height: 12px; background: var(--card); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; }
    .rq-fill { display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: 6px; }
    .rq-val { flex: 0 0 46px; text-align: right; font-weight: 700; }
    .rq-wr { flex: 0 0 78px; text-align: right; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .rq-reg, .rq-foot { font-size: 0.72rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 6px; }
    /* ⏱ Early-detection / lead-time panel (§7) */
    .lt-leaders { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px 14px; margin: 8px 0; font-size: 0.72rem; }
    .lt-lead { white-space: nowrap; }
    .lt-lead b { font-weight: 700; margin-right: 3px; }
    .lt-rows { margin: 8px 0; }
    .lt-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.74rem; margin: 4px 0; padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--surface); }
    .lt-row .lt-v { flex: 0 0 16px; text-align: center; }
    .lt-row .lt-nm { flex: 1 1 auto; font-weight: 600; min-width: 90px; }
    .lt-row .lt-m { flex: 0 0 auto; white-space: nowrap; }
    .lt-row .lt-n { flex: 0 0 auto; }
    /* 🧪 Component laboratory collapsible rows */
    .cl-item > summary { cursor: pointer; list-style: none; }
    .cl-item > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    .cl-body { padding: 4px 8px 8px 26px; }
    .cl-body .rq-cap { margin: 3px 0; }
    /* Calibration curve (#4) + exclude-largest-winners line */
    .rq-cal { margin: 8px 0; font-size: 0.74rem; }
    .rq-cal > summary { cursor: pointer; }
    .rq-cal-body { margin-top: 6px; }
    .cal-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin: 3px 0; font-size: 0.72rem; }
    .cal-band { flex: 0 0 64px; color: var(--text-dim); }
    .cal-track { flex: 1; position: relative; height: 12px; background: var(--card); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; }
    .cal-act { display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: 6px; }
